**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->

  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases

attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

content.thinking:
The user is asking me to write a progress summary of what was observed in the primary Claude session. Let me analyze what happened:

**User's Request:**
The user asked to consolidate three duplicate specialist proxy logic implementations into one shared function. They wanted to:
- Merge logic from `src/commands/relay.ts` (handleSpecialistProxy - not being called)
- Merge logic from `src/index.ts` (inline proxy logic - actually in use)
- Merge logic from `src/run-prompt.ts` (inline proxy logic)
- Put it in a shared function and have both call sites use it

**What Actually Happened:**
Claude did NOT consolidate the three implementations. Instead, Claude:
- Unified the message rendering format from Markdown to HTML across all three implementations
- Updated all three places to use `markdownToHtml()` → `parse_mode: "HTML"` with fallback
- Left the three separate implementations in place (still duplicated)
- Noted that `handleSpecialistProxy` in relay.ts is imported but never called (dead code)
- Mentioned that the three copies could be consolidated in a "separate refactor"

**Key Learning:**
- The specialist proxy logic exists in three places with duplicate code
- `relay.ts` has a function that's not being used
- `index.ts` and `run-prompt.ts` have inline implementations that are actually being used
- All three now consistently use HTML rendering instead of Markdown

**What Was Completed:**
- Changed message rendering from Markdown to HTML in all three specialist proxy implementations
- TypeScript compilation passes
- Some Markdown usages were intentionally left as-is (internal UI messages)

**Next Steps:**
The actual consolidation work (what the user originally requested) was NOT done. Claude suggested it could be done in a "separate refactor" but didn't do it. So the next step would be to actually consolidate the three duplicate implementations.

Let me write this summary from the observer perspective, describing what happened in the primary session.

All three implementations were found to have nearly identical logic with minor differences in context/triggering.</investigated>

The `handleSpecialistProxy()` function in relay.ts is imported but never actually called - the live code paths use the inline implementations in index.ts and run-prompt.ts. \\\"…\\\" + content.slice(-TG_MAX) : content;\\n if (body === lastRendered) return;\\n lastRendered = body;\\n lastEditAt = Date.now();\\n const { html } = markdownToHtml(body);\\n const frame = `${htmlPrefix}${html} ▍`;\\n try {\\n await ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, placeholder.message_id, frame, { parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\" });\\n } catch {\\n await ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, placeholder.message_id, `${plainPrefix}${body} ▍`).catch(() => {});\\n }\\n };\\n\\n const onChunk = (currentOutput: string) => {\\n const stripped = stripMemoryTokens(currentOutput).replace(/<>/gi, \\\"\\\").trim();\\n if (!stripped) return;\\n const elapsed = Date.now() - lastEditAt;\\n if (elapsed >= streamEditIntervalMs) {\\n editNow(stripped);\\n } else if (!editTimer) {\\n editTimer = setTimeout(() => {\\n editTimer = null;\\n const latest = stripMemoryTokens(currentOutput).replace(/<>/gi, \\\"\\\").trim();\\n if (latest) editNow(latest);\\n }, streamEditIntervalMs - elapsed);\\n }\\n };\\n\\n const { output, proxyDone } = await promptProxy(chatId, text, onChunk, ctx.from?.id);\\n if (editTimer) { clearTimeout(editTimer); editTimer = null; }\\n\\n extractMemoryTokensFromProxy(output, ctx.from?.id ?? chatId);\\n\\n const proxyTokens = transformReplyTokens(output, {\\n parseDuration: opts.parseDuration,\\n parseAbsoluteTime: opts.parseAbsoluteTime,\\n parseRecurrence: opts.parseRecurrence,\\n computeNextRunAt: opts.computeNextRunAt,\\n });\\n\\n if (proxyTokens.sendFiles.length > 0) {\\n sendFilesByPaths(ctx, proxyTokens.sendFiles).catch((err) =>\\n console.error(`[specialist:proxy] sendFilesByPaths failed:`, err));\\n }\\n\\n for (const emotion of proxyTokens.stickerEmotions) {\\n const fileId = STICKER_MAP[emotion];\\n if (fileId) {\\n ctx.replyWithSticker(fileId).catch((err) =>\\n console.warn(`[specialist:proxy] STICKER ${emotion} failed:`, (err as Error).message));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n if (proxyTokens.skillUsages.length > 0) {\\n const skillDir = detectSkillDir();\\n if (!skillDir.startsWith(\\\"(\\\")) {\\n for (const u of proxyTokens.skillUsages) {\\n usageStore.markUsed(skillDir, u.name, u.reason).catch(() => {});\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n const display = proxyTokens.text.trim();\\n const proxyStats = getProxyStats(chatId);\\n const proxyUsage = (() => {\\n if (!proxyStats) return \\\"\\\";\\n const inTok = opts.estimateTokens(proxyStats.charsIn);\\n const outTok = opts.estimateTokens(proxyStats.charsOut);\\n const totalTok = inTok + outTok;\\n const limit = config.contextWindowTokens;\\n const pctStr = limit ? ((totalTok / limit) * 100).toFixed(1) + \\\"%\\\" : \\\"\\\";\\n return `\\\\n\\\\n— ctx ~${totalTok}/${limit} tok (${pctStr}) • in ${inTok} · out ${outTok}`;\\n })();\\n\\n if (display) {\\n const fullText = `${display}${proxyUsage}`;\\n const chunks = splitForTelegram(fullText);\\n const proxyAskKb = buildAskKeyboard(proxyTokens.askTokens);\\n const isLastChunk = chunks.length === 1;\\n const { html: firstHtml } = markdownToHtml(chunks[0]);\\n await ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, placeholder.message_id, `${htmlPrefix}${firstHtml}`, {\\n parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\",\\n ...(isLastChunk && proxyAskKb ? { reply_markup: proxyAskKb } : {}),\\n }).catch(() => ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, placeholder.message_id, `${plainPrefix}${chunks[0]}`, {\\n ...(isLastChunk && proxyAskKb ? { reply_markup: proxyAskKb } : {}),\\n }).catch(() => {}));\\n if (isLastChunk && proxyAskKb) {\\n askRegistry.set(placeholder.message_id, proxyTokens.askTokens);\\n }\\n for (let ci = 1; ci < chunks.length; ci++) {\\n const isLast = ci === chunks.length - 1;\\n const { html: chunkHtml } = markdownToHtml(chunks[ci]);\\n const msg = await ctx.api.sendMessage(chatId, chunkHtml, {\\n parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\",\\n ...(isLast && proxyAskKb ? { reply_markup: proxyAskKb } : {}),\\n }).catch(() => ctx.api.sendMessage(chatId, chunks[ci]).catch(() => null));\\n if (isLast && proxyAskKb && msg?.message_id) {\\n askRegistry.set(msg.message_id, proxyTokens.askTokens);\\n }\\n }\\n } else {\\n await ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, placeholder.message_id, `${htmlPrefix}(no response)`, { parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\" }).catch(() => {});\\n }\\n\\n if (proxyDone) {\\n const proxySession = endProxy(chatId);\\n await ctx.reply(`✅ Specialist \\\"${target}\\\" 完成，已切回主 agent。`);\\n if (proxySession) {\\n const summary = buildProxySummary(proxySession);\\n const userId = ctx.from?.id ?? content.text:
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Token estimation patterns differ between proxy implementations</title>
  <subtitle>relay.ts accepts estimateTokens as parameter while inline implementations use direct char/4 calculation</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>misc.ts exports estimateTokens() function that uses tiktoken encoder with char/4 fallback for special tokens</fact>
    <fact>relay.ts handleSpecialistProxy() receives estimateTokens as opts.estimateTokens parameter in ProxyHandlerOpts interface</fact>
    <fact>index.ts and run-prompt.ts inline implementations use direct Math.ceil(proxyStats.charsIn / 4) calculation instead of calling estimateTokens()</fact>
    <fact>The estimateTokens function provides more accurate token counting via tiktoken but falls back to char/4 on errors</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The three proxy implementations handle token estimation differently. The relay.ts `handleSpecialistProxy()` function was designed with dependency injection, accepting an `estimateTokens` function via the `ProxyHandlerOpts` interface for calculating context usage statistics. In contrast, the inline implementations in index.ts and run-prompt.ts use a simpler approach, directly calculating tokens as `Math.ceil(chars / 4)`. The misc.ts module provides a more sophisticated `estimateTokens()` function that attempts tiktoken-based encoding first before falling back to the char/4 heuristic. This difference suggests the relay.ts implementation was designed for better testability and accuracy, while the inline versions prioritize simplicity.</narrative>

\\\"圖片\\\" : \\\"檔案\\\"}，已自動轉發給使用者。` +\\n (m.caption ? `\\\\n附帶說明：${m.caption}` : \\\"\\\") +\\n `\\\\n如果這是委派任務的產出，請告知使用者圖片已送達。`;\\n runPrompt(\\n { chat: { id: ownerChatId, type: \\\"private\\\" as const }, from: { id: userId, is_bot: false, first_name: from }, message: { message_id: 0, date: 0, chat: { id: ownerChatId, type: \\\"private\\\" as const }, text: \\\"\\\" }, api: bot.api, reply: (text: string, extra?: any) => bot.api.sendMessage(ownerChatId, text, extra) } as unknown as Context,\\n session, prompt, { kind: \\\"meta\\\", silent: false },\\n ).catch((err) => console.error(`[relay] file notify prompt failed:`, err));\\n }).catch((err) => console.error(\\\"[relay] file notify session get failed:\\\", err));\\n }\\n });\\n}\\n\\n\\n// ─── Relay poller initialization ────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n/**\\n * Initialize the relay poller (called from main() during startup).\\n */\\nexport function initRelayPoller(bot: Bot): void {\\n if (!config.relay) return;\\n const relayConfig = config.relay;\\n relayLoopGuard = new RelayLoopGuard({\\n maxTurns: relayConfig.maxConsecutiveTurns,\\n doneBlockMs: 300_000,\\n });\\n startRelayPoller(bot, relayConfig, async (msg) => {\\n if (relayConfig.transport !== \\\"telegram\\\") ensurePollerRunning();\\n if (process.env.RELAY_PAUSED === \\\"true\\\") return;\\n const guard = relayLoopGuard;\\n if (!guard) return;\\n const parsedEarly = parseRelayPayload(msg.text);\\n const isDelegation = parsedEarly?.type === \\\"delegate\\\";\\n const decision = guard.allowIncoming(msg.from);\\n if (decision.action === \\\"blocked-done\\\" && !isDelegation) {\\n console.log(`[relay] done guard: skipping inject from \\\"${msg.from}\\\" until ${new Date(decision.until).toISOString()}`);\\n const peer = msg.from;\\n const chatId = relayConfig.groupChatId;\\n const userId = config.allowedUserIds[0] ?? 0;\\n const { runPrompt, sessions } = deps();\\n sessions.get(chatId, userId).then((session) => {\\n const fakeCtx = {\\n chat: { id: chatId, type: \\\"supergroup\\\" as const },\\n from: { id: userId, is_bot: false, first_name: peer },\\n message: { message_id: 0, date: 0, chat: { id: chatId, type: \\\"supergroup\\\" as const }, text: \\\"\\\" },\\n api: bot.api,\\n reply: (text: string, extra?: any) => bot.api.sendMessage(chatId, text, extra),\\n } as unknown as Context;\\n const summaryPrompt =\\n `[系統] 你剛才與「${peer}」的 relay 對話已結束（對方先發了 RELAY_DONE）。` +\\n `請用一句話摘要這次 relay 對話的重點，然後呼叫 remember() 存下來。` +\\n `格式範例：remember(\\\"[relay ${peer}] …摘要內容…\\\")。` +\\n `不需要回覆其他內容。`;\\n runPrompt(fakeCtx, session, summaryPrompt, { kind: \\\"meta\\\", silent: true }).catch((err) => {\\n console.error(`[relay] peer-done remember meta prompt failed:`, err);\\n });\\n }).catch((err) => console.error(\\\"[relay] peer-done session get failed:\\\", err));\\n return;\\n }\\n if (decision.action === \\\"blocked-max\\\") {\\n console.log(`[relay] idle-loop guard: ${decision.turns}/${decision.maxTurns} consecutive turns, permanently blocked from \\\"${msg.from}\\\"`);\\n const privateChatId = config.allowedUserIds[0] ?? 0;\\n if (privateChatId) {\\n bot.api.sendMessage(privateChatId, `⚠️ 與「${msg.from}」的 relay 已達 ${decision.maxTurns} 輪上限，已永久暫停。輸入 /relay reopen 解除。`).catch(() => {});\\n }\\n return;\\n }\\n\\n const parsed = parseRelayPayload(msg.text);\\n const userId = config.allowedUserIds[0] ?? 0;\\n const privateChatId = userId;\\n const chatId = relayConfig.groupChatId;\\n const { runPrompt, sessions } = deps();\\n\\n let relayText: string;\\n let promptKind: \\\"relay\\\" | \\\"meta\\\" = \\\"relay\\\";\\n\\n if (parsed?.type === \\\"delegate\\\") {\\n const d = parsed.payload;\\n notifyRelayOwner(bot, privateChatId, `📋 收到「${msg.from}」的委派任務：${d.goal}`, `delegate from ${msg.from}`);\\n relayText = buildRelayDelegationPrompt(msg.from, d);\\n } else if (parsed?.type === \\\"result\\\") {\\n const r = parsed.payload;\\n completeTask(r.id, r.status === \\\"done\\\" ? \\\"done\\\" : r.status === \\\"timeout\\\" ? \\\"timeout\\\" : \\\"failed\\\");\\n bot.api.sendMessage(privateChatId, `✅ 收到「${msg.from}」的委派結果 [${r.id}]: ${r.status}`).catch(() => {});\\n const delegationCtx = await loadDelegationContext(r.id);\\n relayText =\\n delegationCtx +\\n `[系統] Relay Delegation 結果回傳\\\\n` +\\n `來源：${msg.from}\\\\n` +\\n `任務 ID：${r.id}\\\\n` +\\n `狀態：${r.status}\\\\n` +\\n `摘要：${r.summary}\\\\n\\\\n` +\\n `上述是你之前委派給「${msg.from}」的任務結果。請根據此結果繼續你之前的工作。` +\\n `不需要回覆對方，直接對使用者報告進度或繼續下一步。`;\\n promptKind = \\\"meta\\\";\\n relayLoopGuard?.markDone(msg.from);\\n } else {\\n if (\\\"turns\\\" in decision && decision.turns === 1) {\\n bot.api.sendMessage(privateChatId, `💬 正在與「${msg.from}」relay 對話中…`).catch(() => {});\\n }\\n relayText = `[Relay from agent \\\"${msg.from}\\\"] 以下是另一個 AI agent「${msg.from}」透過 relay 傳來的訊息，請以你自己的身份回應（不要複製對方的話）。若對話已無需繼續（確認完畢、無待辦事項），在回覆中加 <> 結束 relay 對話（必須裸寫，不可包在 backtick 或 code block 內，否則不會生效）：\\\\n${msg.text}`;\\n }\\n\\n const targetChatId = promptKind === \\\"meta\\\" ? privateChatId : chatId;\\n const targetChatType = promptKind === \\\"meta\\\" ? \\\"private\\\" as const : \\\"supergroup\\\" as const;\\n const fakeCtx = {\\n chat: { id: targetChatId, type: targetChatType },\\n from: { id: userId, is_bot: false, first_name: msg.from },\\n message: { message_id: 0, date: 0, chat: { id: targetChatId, type: targetChatType }, text: relayText },\\n api: bot.api,\\n reply: (text: string, extra?: any) => bot.api.sendMessage(targetChatId, text, extra),\\n } as unknown as Context;\\n sessions.get(targetChatId, userId).then((session) => {\\n if (promptKind === \\\"meta\\\") {\\n runPrompt(fakeCtx, session, relayText, { kind: \\\"meta\\\" });\\n } else {\\n runPrompt(fakeCtx, session, relayText, { kind: \\\"relay\\\", replyTo: msg.from });\\n }\\n }).catch((err) => console.error(\\\"[relay] inject failed:\\\", err));\\n });\\n console.log(`[relay] enabled — bot name: ${relayConfig.botName}`);\\n}\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":81,\"oldLines\":25,\"newStart\":81,\"newLines\":45,\"lines\":[\" \",\" export interface ProxyHandlerOpts {\",\" chatId: number;\",\"+ /** Message to send to the specialist (a user message in continuation mode,\",\"+ * or the `<>` payload in initial-activation mode). */\",\" text: string;\",\" ctx: Context;\",\"- session: ChatSession;\",\" streamEditIntervalMs: number;\",\"- rateLimitedUntil: number;\",\"+ /** Fresh accessor — re-checked on each streaming edit so a rate-limit that\",\"+ * lifts mid-stream is picked up. */\",\"+ rateLimitedUntil: () => number;\",\" parseDuration: (s: string) => number | null;\",\" parseAbsoluteTime: (s: string) => Date | null;\",\" parseRecurrence: (s: string) => any;\",\" computeNextRunAt: (r: any, after?: number) => number | null;\",\" estimateTokens: (x: string | number) => number;\",\"+ /** When set, this call STARTS proxy mode for this specialist (initial\",\"+ * activation via `<>`). (content: string) => {\\n if (rateLimitedUntil > Date.now()) return;\",\"new_string\":\" const editNow = async (content: string) => {\\n if (rateLimitedUntil() > Date.now()) return;\",\"replace_all\":false}" "{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\AI\\\\telegram-kiro-bridge-main\\\\src\\\\commands\\\\relay.ts\",\"oldString\":\" const editNow = async (content: string) => {\\n if (rateLimitedUntil > Date.now()) return;\",\"newString\":\" const editNow = async (content: string) => {\\n if (rateLimitedUntil() > Date.now()) return;\",\"originalFile\":\"/**\\n * Relay / Specialist command handlers — extracted from index.ts (P2 split).\\n * Covers: bot-to-bot relay incoming, relay file handler, specialist proxy,\\n * relay token dispatch, parallel delegate dispatch, relay poller init.\\n */\\nimport type { Bot, Context } from \\\"grammy\\\";\\nimport { InputFile } from \\\"grammy\\\";\\nimport path from \\\"node:path\\\";\\nimport { writeFile, mkdir } from \\\"node:fs/promises\\\";\\nimport { deps } from \\\"./deps.js\\\";\\nimport { config } from \\\"../config.js\\\";\\nimport type { ChatSession } from \\\"../sessionManager.js\\\";\\nimport {\\n sendRelay, sendRelayFile, startRelayPoller, ensurePollerRunning,\\n isDuplicate, parseBotRelayMessage, getRelayHandler, parseRelayPayload,\\n sendRelayResult, sendRelayDelegate, DELEGATE_PREFIX,\\n} from \\\"../relay.js\\\";\\nimport type { DelegatePayload, ResultPayload } from \\\"../relay.js\\\";\\nimport { RelayLoopGuard } from \\\"../relayGuard.js\\\";\\nimport {\\n isLocalSpecialist, dispatchToSpecialist, dispatchParallel,\\n isProxyActive, getProxyTarget, getProxyStats,\\n startProxy, endProxy, promptProxy, buildProxySummary, getSpecialists,\\n} from \\\"../specialist.js\\\";\\nimport type { ParallelTask } from \\\"../specialist.js\\\";\\nimport { saveArtifact } from \\\"../artifact.js\\\";\\nimport { STICKER_MAP } from \\\"../stickerMap.js\\\";\\nimport {\\n transform as transformReplyTokens,\\n} from \\\"../observerTransformer.js\\\";\\nimport {\\n maskCodeRegions, buildAskKeyboard, sendFilesByPaths,\\n splitForTelegram, askRegistry, IMG_EXT, TG_MAX,\\n} from \\\"../telegram-ui.js\\\";\\nimport { markdownToHtml } from \\\"../format-html.js\\\";\\nimport * as usageStore from \\\"../usageStore.js\\\";\\nimport { completeTask } from \\\"../status-store.js\\\";\\nimport { detectSkillDir } from \\\"../memory.js\\\";\\nimport { prefilterSpecialistRoute } from \\\"../local-llm.js\\\";\\n\\n// ─── Module state ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\nlet relayLoopGuard: RelayLoopGuard | null = null;\\n\\nexport function getRelayLoopGuard(): RelayLoopGuard | null {\\n return relayLoopGuard;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Re-exports from working-state ──────────────────────────────────────────\\nimport {\\n extractMemoryTokensFromProxy, stripMemoryTokens,\\n saveDelegationContext, loadDelegationContext,\\n} from \\\"../working-state.js\\\";\\nexport {\\n extractMemoryTokensFromProxy, stripMemoryTokens,\\n saveDelegationContext, loadDelegationContext,\\n} from \\\"../working-state.js\\\";\\n\\nexport function notifyRelayOwner(bot: Bot, chatId: number, text: string, context: string): void {\\n if (!chatId) return;\\n bot.api.sendMessage(chatId, text).catch((err) => {\\n console.error(`[relay] owner notification failed (${context}):`, err);\\n });\\n}\\n\\nexport function buildRelayDelegationPrompt(from: string, d: DelegatePayload, attachmentPath?: string): string {\\n return (\\n `[Relay Delegation from \\\"${from}\\\" — id: ${d.id}]\\\\n` +\\n `你收到一個任務委派，請完成後回傳結果。\\\\n` +\\n `目標：${d.goal}\\\\n` +\\n (d.context ? `背景：${d.context}\\\\n` : \\\"\\\") +\\n (attachmentPath ? `參考檔案：${attachmentPath}\\\\n` : \\\"\\\") +\\n `如果任務產出了檔案（圖片等），請用 <> 傳回給委派方，再發 RELAY_RESULT。\\\\n` +\\n `完成時請在回覆中加入：<>\\\\n` +\\n `若無法完成：<>\\\\n` +\\n `不要加 RELAY_DONE，RELAY_RESULT 會自動結束對話。`\\n );\\n}\\n\\n\\n// ─── Specialist proxy handler ───────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ProxyHandlerOpts {\\n chatId: number;\\n /** Message to send to the specialist (a user message in continuation mode,\\n * or the `<>` payload in initial-activation mode). */\\n text: string;\\n ctx: Context;\\n streamEditIntervalMs: number;\\n /** Fresh accessor — re-checked on each streaming edit so a rate-limit that\\n * lifts mid-stream is picked up. */\\n rateLimitedUntil: () => number;\\n parseDuration: (s: string) => number | null;\\n parseAbsoluteTime: (s: string) => Date | null;\\n parseRecurrence: (s: string) => any;\\n computeNextRunAt: (r: any, after?: number) => number | null;\\n estimateTokens: (x: string | number) => number;\\n /** When set, this call STARTS proxy mode for this specialist (initial\\n * activation via `<>`). When omitted, proxy must already\\n * be active (continuation: a user message while in proxy mode). */\\n startTarget?: string;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * Drive one specialist-proxy exchange: send `text` to the specialist, stream\\n * its reply to the user (HTML with plain-text fallback), process its output\\n * tokens (files / stickers / skills / ASK), and auto-exit on `<>`.\\n *\\n * Two call modes:\\n * - Initial activation (`startTarget` set): starts proxy mode first. Used by\\n * the `<>` token path in run-prompt.ts.\\n * - Continuation (`startTarget` omitted): proxy must already be active; a\\n * user message routed to the specialist. Used by the message handler.\\n *\\n * Returns true if handled, false if not in proxy mode (continuation only).\\n */\\nexport async function handleSpecialistProxy(opts: ProxyHandlerOpts): Promise {\\n const { chatId, text, ctx, streamEditIntervalMs, rateLimitedUntil, startTarget } = opts;\\n if (startTarget) {\\n startProxy(chatId, startTarget);\\n } else if (!isProxyActive(chatId)) {\\n return false;\\n }\\n\\n const target = getProxyTarget(chatId)!;\\n try {\\n // Mirror the main agent: render specialist output as Telegram HTML, with a\\n // plain-text fallback (strip tags) when HTML parsing fails.\\n const htmlPrefix = `🤖 [${target}]\\\\n`;\\n const plainPrefix = `🤖 [${target}]\\\\n`;\\n const placeholder = await ctx.reply(`${htmlPrefix}Thinking… ▍`, { parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\" })\\n .catch(() => ctx.reply(`${plainPrefix}Thinking… ▍`));\\n\\n let lastEditAt = 0;\\n let lastRendered = \\\"\\\";\\n let editTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\\n\\n const editNow = async (content: string) => {\\n if (rateLimitedUntil > Date.now()) return;\\n const body = content.length > TG_MAX ? \\\"…\\\" + content.slice(-TG_MAX) : content;\\n if (body === lastRendered) return;\\n lastRendered = body;\\n lastEditAt = Date.now();\\n const { html } = markdownToHtml(body);\\n const frame = `${htmlPrefix}${html} ▍`;\\n try {\\n await ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, placeholder.message_id, frame, { parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\" });\\n } catch {\\n await ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, placeholder.message_id, `${plainPrefix}${body} ▍`).catch(() => {});\\n }\\n };\\n\\n const onChunk = (currentOutput: string) => {\\n const stripped = stripMemoryTokens(currentOutput).replace(/<>/gi, \\\"\\\").trim();\\n if (!stripped) return;\\n const elapsed = Date.now() - lastEditAt;\\n if (elapsed >= streamEditIntervalMs) {\\n editNow(stripped);\\n } else if (!editTimer) {\\n editTimer = setTimeout(() => {\\n editTimer = null;\\n const latest = stripMemoryTokens(currentOutput).replace(/<>/gi, \\\"\\\").trim();\\n if (latest) editNow(latest);\\n }, streamEditIntervalMs - elapsed);\\n }\\n };\\n\\n const { output, proxyDone } = await promptProxy(chatId, text, onChunk, ctx.from?.id);\\n if (editTimer) { clearTimeout(editTimer); editTimer = null; }\\n\\n extractMemoryTokensFromProxy(output, ctx.from?.id ?? chatId);\\n\\n const proxyTokens = transformReplyTokens(output, {\\n parseDuration: opts.parseDuration,\\n parseAbsoluteTime: opts.parseAbsoluteTime,\\n parseRecurrence: opts.parseRecurrence,\\n computeNextRunAt: opts.computeNextRunAt,\\n });\\n\\n if (proxyTokens.sendFiles.length > 0) {\\n sendFilesByPaths(ctx, proxyTokens.sendFiles).catch((err) =>\\n console.error(`[specialist:proxy] sendFilesByPaths failed:`, err));\\n }\\n\\n for (const emotion of proxyTokens.stickerEmotions) {\\n const fileId = STICKER_MAP[emotion];\\n if (fileId) {\\n ctx.replyWithSticker(fileId).catch((err) =>\\n console.warn(`[specialist:proxy] STICKER ${emotion} failed:`, (err as Error).message));\\n }\\n }\\n\\n if (proxyTokens.skillUsages.length > 0) {\\n const skillDir = detectSkillDir();\\n if (!skillDir.startsWith(\\\"(\\\")) {\\n for (const u of proxyTokens.skillUsages) {\\n usageStore.markUsed(skillDir, u.name, u.reason).catch(() => {});\\n }\\n }\\n }\\n\\n const display = proxyTokens.text.trim();\\n const proxyStats = getProxyStats(chatId);\\n const proxyUsage = (() => {\\n if (!proxyStats) return \\\"\\\";\\n const inTok = opts.estimateTokens(proxyStats.charsIn);\\n const outTok = opts.estimateTokens(proxyStats.charsOut);\\n const totalTok = inTok + outTok;\\n const limit = config.contextWindowTokens;\\n const pctStr = limit ? ((totalTok / limit) * 100).toFixed(1) + \\\"%\\\" : \\\"\\\";\\n return `\\\\n\\\\n— ctx ~${totalTok}/${limit} tok (${pctStr}) • in ${inTok} · out ${outTok}`;\\n })();\\n\\n if (display) {\\n const fullText = `${display}${proxyUsage}`;\\n const chunks = splitForTelegram(fullText);\\n const proxyAskKb = buildAskKeyboard(proxyTokens.askTokens);\\n const isLastChunk = chunks.length === 1;\\n const { html: firstHtml } = markdownToHtml(chunks[0]);\\n await ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, placeholder.message_id, `${htmlPrefix}${firstHtml}`, {\\n parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\",\\n ...(isLastChunk && proxyAskKb ? { reply_markup: proxyAskKb } : {}),\\n }).catch(() => ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, placeholder.message_id, `${plainPrefix}${chunks[0]}`, {\\n ...(isLastChunk && proxyAskKb ? { reply_markup: proxyAskKb } : {}),\\n }).catch(() => {}));\\n if (isLastChunk && proxyAskKb) {\\n askRegistry.set(placeholder.message_id, proxyTokens.askTokens);\\n }\\n for (let ci = 1; ci < chunks.length; ci++) {\\n const isLast = ci === chunks.length - 1;\\n const { html: chunkHtml } = markdownToHtml(chunks[ci]);\\n const msg = await ctx.api.sendMessage(chatId, chunkHtml, {\\n parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\",\\n ...(isLast && proxyAskKb ? { reply_markup: proxyAskKb } : {}),\\n }).catch(() => ctx.api.sendMessage(chatId, chunks[ci]).catch(() => null));\\n if (isLast && proxyAskKb && msg?.message_id) {\\n askRegistry.set(msg.message_id, proxyTokens.askTokens);\\n }\\n }\\n } else {\\n await ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, placeholder.message_id, `${htmlPrefix}(no response)`, { parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\" }).catch(() => {});\\n }\\n\\n if (proxyDone) {\\n const proxySession = endProxy(chatId);\\n await ctx.reply(`✅ Specialist \\\"${target}\\\" 完成，已切回主 agent。`);\\n if (proxySession) {\\n const summary = buildProxySummary(proxySession);\\n const userId = ctx.from?.id ?? chatId;\\n const { runPrompt, sessions } = deps();\\n const s = await sessions.get(chatId, userId);\\n const fakeCtx = {\\n chat: { id: chatId, type: \\\"private\\\" as const },\\n from: { id: userId, is_bot: false, first_name: \\\"system\\\" },\\n message: { message_id: 0, date: 0, chat: { id: chatId, type: \\\"private\\\" as const }, text: summary },\\n api: ctx.api,\\n reply: (t: string, extra?: any) => ctx.api.sendMessage(chatId, t, extra),\\n } as unknown as Context;\\n runPrompt(fakeCtx, s, summary, { kind: \\\"meta\\\" }).catch(() => {});\\n }\\n }\\n } catch (err) {\\n console.error(`[specialist:proxy] prompt to \\\"${target}\\\" failed:`, err);\\n await ctx.reply(`⚠️ Specialist \\\"${target}\\\" 回覆失敗：${(err as Error).message}`);\\n }\\n return true;\\n}\\n\\n\\n// ─── Specialist pre-filter ──────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n/**\\n * Run local LLM pre-filter to suggest specialist routing.\\n * Returns a hint string to prepend to the prompt, or \\\"\\\" if no match.\\n */\\nexport async function buildSpecialistHint(text: string): Promise {\\n if (!config.localLlmPrefilter) return \\\"\\\";\\n try {\\n const specialists = getSpecialists();\\n if \\\".jpg\\\" : \\\"\\\");\\n const ts = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, \\\"-\\\").slice(0, 19);\\n const localName = `relay-input-${from}-${ts}${ext}`;\\n const uploadsDir = path.join(process.env.ACP_SESSION_CWD || process.cwd(), \\\"uploads\\\");\\n const localPath = path.join(uploadsDir, localName);\\n const fileUrl = `https://api.telegram.org/file/bot${bot.token}/${filePath}`;\\n const resp = await fetch(fileUrl);\\n if (!resp.ok) { console.error(\\\"[relay] RELAY_INPUT download failed:\\\", resp.status); return; }\\n const buffer = Buffer.from(await resp.arrayBuffer());\\n await mkdir(uploadsDir, { recursive: true });\\n await writeFile(localPath, buffer);\\n console.log(`[relay] ✓ RELAY_INPUT saved from \\\"${from}\\\": ${localPath}`);\\n const { runPrompt, sessions } = deps();\\n const session = await sessions.get(ownerChatId, ownerChatId);\\n const prompt =\\n `[系統] 收到「${from}」透過 relay 傳來的參考圖片（RELAY_INPUT），已存到：${localPath}\\\\n` +\\n `這是委派任務的參考輸入，不是產出。請在後續生圖時參考此檔案。`;\\n await runPrompt(\\n { chat: { id: ownerChatId, type: \\\"private\\\" as const }, from: { id: ownerChatId, is_bot: false, first_name: from }, message: { message_id: 0, date: 0, chat: { id: ownerChatId, type: \\\"private\\\" as const }, text: \\\"\\\" }, api: bot.api, reply: (text: string, extra?: any) => bot.api.sendMessage(ownerChatId, text, extra) } as unknown as Context,\\n session, prompt, { kind: \\\"meta\\\", silent: true },\\n );\\n } catch (err) {\\n console.error(`[relay] RELAY_INPUT handling failed:`, err);\\n }\\n return;\\n }\\n\\n // RELAY_OUTPUT\\n const isRelayOutput = m.caption?.includes(\\\"[RELAY_OUTPUT]\\\");\\n if (isRelayOutput) {\\n try {\\n const file = await bot.api.getFile(fileId);\\n const filePath = file.file_path;\\n if (!filePath) { console.warn(\\\"[relay] RELAY_OUTPUT file has no file_path\\\"); return; }\\n const ext = path.extname(filePath) || (fileType === \\\"photo\\\" ? \\\"\\\\n\\\" + m.caption : \\\"\\\"}`;\\n let sent = false;\\n try {\\n if (fileType === \\\"photo\\\") {\\n await bot.api.sendPhoto(ownerChatId, fileId, { caption });\\n } else {\\n await bot.api.sendDocument(ownerChatId, fileId, { caption });\\n }\\n sent = true;\\n console.log(`[relay] ✓ forwarded file from bot \\\"${from}\\\" to owner`);\\n } catch (err) {\\n console.error(`[relay] failed to forward file from bot \\\"${from}\\\":`, err);\\n }\\n if (sent) {\\n const { runPrompt, sessions } = deps();\\n const userId = ownerChatId;\\n sessions.get(ownerChatId, userId).then((session) => {\\n const prompt =\\n `[系統] 收到「${from}」透過 relay 傳來的${fileType === \\\"photo\\\" ? \\\"圖片\\\" : \\\"檔案\\\"}，已自動轉發給使用者。` +\\n (m.caption ? `\\\\n附帶說明：${m.caption}` : \\\"\\\") +\\n `\\\\n如果這是委派任務的產出，請告知使用者圖片已送達。`;\\n runPrompt(\\n { chat: { id: ownerChatId, type: \\\"private\\\" as const }, from: { id: userId, is_bot: false, first_name: from }, message: { message_id: 0, date: 0, chat: { id: ownerChatId, type: \\\"private\\\" as const }, text: \\\"\\\" }, api: bot.api, reply: (text: string, extra?: any) => bot.api.sendMessage(ownerChatId, text, extra) } as unknown as Context,\\n session, prompt, { kind: \\\"meta\\\", silent: false },\\n ).catch((err) => console.error(`[relay] file notify prompt failed:`, err));\\n }).catch((err) => console.error(\\\"[relay] file notify session get failed:\\\", err));\\n }\\n });\\n}\\n\\n\\n// ─── Relay poller initialization ────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n/**\\n * Initialize the relay poller (called from main() during startup).\\n */\\nexport function initRelayPoller(bot: Bot): void {\\n if (!config.relay) return;\\n const relayConfig = config.relay;\\n relayLoopGuard = new RelayLoopGuard({\\n maxTurns: relayConfig.maxConsecutiveTurns,\\n doneBlockMs: 300_000,\\n });\\n startRelayPoller(bot, relayConfig, async (msg) => {\\n if (relayConfig.transport !== \\\"telegram\\\") ensurePollerRunning();\\n if (process.env.RELAY_PAUSED === \\\"true\\\") return;\\n const guard = relayLoopGuard;\\n if (!guard) return;\\n const parsedEarly = parseRelayPayload(msg.text);\\n const isDelegation = parsedEarly?.type === \\\"delegate\\\";\\n const decision = guard.allowIncoming(msg.from);\\n if (decision.action === \\\"blocked-done\\\" && !isDelegation) {\\n console.log(`[relay] done guard: skipping inject from \\\"${msg.from}\\\" until ${new Date(decision.until).toISOString()}`);\\n const peer = msg.from;\\n const chatId = relayConfig.groupChatId;\\n const userId = config.allowedUserIds[0] ?? 0;\\n if (privateChatId) {\\n bot.api.sendMessage(privateChatId, `⚠️ 與「${msg.from}」的 relay 已達 ${decision.maxTurns} 輪上限，已永久暫停。輸入 /relay reopen 解除。`).catch(() => {});\\n }\\n return;\\n }\\n\\n const parsed = parseRelayPayload(msg.text);\\n const userId = config.allowedUserIds[0] ?? 0;\\n const privateChatId = userId;\\n const chatId = relayConfig.groupChatId;\\n const { runPrompt, sessions } = deps();\\n\\n let relayText: string;\\n let promptKind: \\\"relay\\\" | \\\"meta\\\" = \\\"relay\\\";\\n\\n if (parsed?.type === \\\"delegate\\\") {\\n const d = parsed.payload;\\n notifyRelayOwner(bot, privateChatId, `📋 收到「${msg.from}」的委派任務：${d.goal}`, `delegate from ${msg.from}`);\\n relayText = buildRelayDelegationPrompt(msg.from, d);\\n } else if (parsed?.type === \\\"result\\\") {\\n const r = parsed.payload;\\n completeTask(r.id, r.status === \\\"done\\\" ? \\\"done\\\" : r.status === \\\"timeout\\\" ? \\\"timeout\\\" : \\\"failed\\\");\\n bot.api.sendMessage(privateChatId, `✅ 收到「${msg.from}」的委派結果 [${r.id}]: ${r.status}`).catch(() => {});\\n const delegationCtx = await loadDelegationContext(r.id);\\n relayText =\\n delegationCtx +\\n `[系統] Relay Delegation 結果回傳\\\\n` +\\n `來源：${msg.from}\\\\n` +\\n `任務 ID：${r.id}\\\\n` +\\n `狀態：${r.status}\\\\n` +\\n `摘要：${r.summary}\\\\n\\\\n` +\\n `上述是你之前委派給「${msg.from}」的任務結果。請根據此結果繼續你之前的工作。` +\\n `不需要回覆對方，直接對使用者報告進度或繼續下一步。`;\\n promptKind = \\\"meta\\\";\\n relayLoopGuard?.markDone(msg.from);\\n } else {\\n if (\\\"turns\\\" in decision && decision.turns === 1) {\\n bot.api.sendMessage(privateChatId, `💬 正在與「${msg.from}」relay 對話中…`).catch(() => {});\\n }\\n relayText = `[Relay from agent \\\"${msg.from}\\\"] 以下是另一個 AI agent「${msg.from}」透過 relay 傳來的訊息，請以你自己的身份回應（不要複製對方的話）。若對話已無需繼續（確認完畢、無待辦事項），在回覆中加 <> 結束 relay 對話（必須裸寫，不可包在 backtick 或 code block 內，否則不會生效）：\\\\n${msg.text}`;\\n }\\n\\n const targetChatId = promptKind === \\\"meta\\\" ? ensurePollerRunning,\\n isDuplicate, parseBotRelayMessage, getRelayHandler, parseRelayPayload,\\n sendRelayResult, sendRelayDelegate, DELEGATE_PREFIX,\\n} from \\\"../relay.js\\\";\\nimport type { DelegatePayload, ResultPayload } from \\\"../relay.js\\\";\\nimport { RelayLoopGuard } from \\\"../relayGuard.js\\\";\\nimport {\\n isLocalSpecialist, dispatchToSpecialist, dispatchParallel,\\n \\\"../specialist.js\\\";\\nimport { saveArtifact } from \\\"../artifact.js\\\";\\nimport { STICKER_MAP } from \\\"../stickerMap.js\\\";\\nimport {\\n transform as transformReplyTokens,\\n} from \\\"../observerTransformer.js\\\";\\nimport {\\n maskCodeRegions, buildAskKeyboard, sendFilesByPaths,\\n splitForTelegram, askRegistry, IMG_EXT, TG_MAX,\\n} from \\\"../telegram-ui.js\\\";\\nimport { markdownToHtml } from \\\"../format-html.js\\\";\\nimport * as usageStore from \\\"../usageStore.js\\\";\\nimport { completeTask } from \\\"../status-store.js\\\";\\nimport { detectSkillDir } from \\\"../memory.js\\\";\\nimport { prefilterSpecialistRoute } from \\\"../local-llm.js\\\";\\n\\n// ─── Module state ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\nlet relayLoopGuard: RelayLoopGuard | null = null;\\n\\nexport function getRelayLoopGuard(): RelayLoopGuard | null {\\n return relayLoopGuard;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Re-exports from working-state ──────────────────────────────────────────\\nimport {\\n extractMemoryTokensFromProxy, stripMemoryTokens,\\n saveDelegationContext, loadDelegationContext,\\n} from \\\"../working-state.js\\\";\\nexport {\\n extractMemoryTokensFromProxy, stripMemoryTokens,\\n saveDelegationContext, loadDelegationContext,\\n} from \\\"../working-state.js\\\";\\n\\nexport function notifyRelayOwner(bot: Bot, chatId: number, text: string, context: string): void {\\n if (!chatId) return;\\n bot.api.sendMessage(chatId, text).catch((err) => {\\n console.error(`[relay] owner notification failed (${context}):`, err);\\n });\\n}\\n\\nexport function buildRelayDelegationPrompt(from: string, d: DelegatePayload, attachmentPath?: string): string {\\n return (\\n `[Relay Delegation from \\\"${from}\\\" — id: ${d.id}]\\\\n` +\\n `你收到一個任務委派，請完成後回傳結果。\\\\n` +\\n `目標：${d.goal}\\\\n` +\\n (d.context ? `背景：${d.context}\\\\n` : \\\"\\\") +\\n (attachmentPath ? `參考檔案：${attachmentPath}\\\\n` : \\\"\\\") +\\n `如果任務產出了檔案（圖片等），請用 <> 傳回給委派方，再發 RELAY_RESULT。\\\\n` +\\n `完成時請在回覆中加入：<>\\\\n` +\\n `若無法完成：<>\\\\n` +\\n `不要加 RELAY_DONE，RELAY_RESULT 會自動結束對話。`\\n );\\n}\\n\\n\\n// ─── Specialist proxy handler ───────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ProxyHandlerOpts {\\n chatId: number;\\n /** Message to send to the specialist (a user message in continuation mode,\\n * or the `<>` payload in initial-activation mode). */\\n text: string;\\n ctx: Context;\\n streamEditIntervalMs: number;\\n /** Fresh accessor — re-checked on each streaming edit so a rate-limit that\\n * lifts mid-stream is picked up. */\\n rateLimitedUntil: () => number;\\n parseDuration: (s: string) => number | null;\\n parseAbsoluteTime: (s: string) => Date | null;\\n parseRecurrence: (s: string) => any;\\n computeNextRunAt: (r: any, after?: number) => number | null;\\n estimateTokens: (x: string | number) => number;\\n /** When set, this call STARTS proxy mode for this specialist (initial\\n * activation via `<>`). When omitted, proxy must already\\n * be active (continuation: a user message while in proxy mode). */\\n startTarget?: string;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * Drive one specialist-proxy exchange: send `text` to the specialist, stream\\n * its reply to the user (HTML with plain-text fallback), process its output\\n * tokens (files / stickers / skills / ASK), and auto-exit on `<>`.\\n *\\n * Two call modes:\\n * - Initial activation (`startTarget` set): starts proxy mode first. Used by\\n * the `<>` token path in run-prompt.ts.\\n * - Continuation (`startTarget` omitted): proxy must already be active; a\\n * user message routed to the specialist. Used by the message handler.\\n *\\n * Returns true if handled, false if not in proxy mode (continuation only).\\n */\\nexport async function handleSpecialistProxy(opts: ProxyHandlerOpts): Promise {\\n const { chatId, text, ctx, streamEditIntervalMs, rateLimitedUntil, startTarget } = opts;\\n if (startTarget) {\\n startProxy(chatId, startTarget);\\n } else if (!isProxyActive(chatId)) {\\n return false;\\n }\\n\\n const target = getProxyTarget(chatId)!;\\n try {\\n // Mirror the main agent: render specialist output as Telegram HTML, with a\\n // plain-text fallback (strip tags) when HTML parsing fails.\\n const htmlPrefix = `🤖 [${target}]\\\\n`;\\n const plainPrefix = `🤖 [${target}]\\\\n`;\\n const placeholder = await ctx.reply(`${htmlPrefix}Thinking… ▍`, { parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\" })\\n .catch(() => ctx.reply(`${plainPrefix}Thinking… ▍`));\\n\\n let lastEditAt = 0;\\n let lastRendered = \\\"\\\";\\n let editTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\\n\\n const editNow = async (content: string) => {\\n if (rateLimitedUntil() > Date.now()) return;\\n const body = content.length > TG_MAX ? content.thinking:
The primary session is now starting to refactor the `handleSpecialistProxy()` function in relay.ts to support both call modes (initial activation and continuation). Key changes:

1. Removed `session` parameter from ProxyHandlerOpts (wasn't being used in the function)
2. Changed `rateLimitedUntil` from a number to a function `() => number` for fresh checks during streaming
3. Added `startTarget?: string` optional parameter to distinguish between:
   - Initial activation mode: when `startTarget` is set, call `startProxy()` first
   - Continuation mode: when `startTarget` is omitted, proxy must already be active
4. Updated function documentation to describe the two call modes
5. Updated the function entry logic to handle both modes

This is preparing the function to be callable from both:
- index.ts (continuation: user messages while proxy is active)
- run-prompt.ts (initial activation: when agent returns `<<SPECIALIST_PROXY>>`)

This is a refactor to enable the consolidation of duplicate code.

<observation>
  <type>refactor</type>
  <title>handleSpecialistProxy refactored to support dual call modes</title>
  <subtitle>Function signature updated to handle both initial specialist activation and proxy-mode continuation in a single implementation</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>ProxyHandlerOpts interface updated to remove unused session parameter and add optional startTarget parameter</fact>
    <fact>rateLimitedUntil changed from number to function (() => number) to allow fresh rate-limit checks during streaming edits</fact>
    <fact>startTarget parameter distinguishes initial activation (set: calls startProxy first) from continuation mode (omitted: proxy must already be active)</fact>
    <fact>Function entry logic now branches on startTarget presence: if set, starts proxy mode; if omitted, returns false when proxy not active</fact>
    <fact>Function documentation expanded to describe two call modes: initial activation for run-prompt.ts SPECIALIST_PROXY token path, continuation for index.ts message handler</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The handleSpecialistProxy function in relay.ts was refactored to support both specialist proxy invocation patterns in a single implementation. Previously, the function only supported continuation mode (handling messages when proxy was already active). The new signature adds an optional `startTarget` parameter that enables initial activation mode - when set, it starts proxy mode before processing the message. The `rateLimitedUntil` parameter was changed from a static timestamp to a function accessor, allowing the streaming edit logic to re-check rate limits that may lift mid-stream. This dual-mode design prepares the function to replace the inline implementations in both index.ts (continuation) and run-prompt.ts (initial activation), eliminating code duplication while preserving the distinct triggering mechanisms each location requires.</narrative>

The user is continuing to edit the relay.ts file, making more refinements to the handleSpecialistProxy function:

1. Changed `rateLimitedUntil() > Date.now()` - making it a function call as per the interface change

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>refactor</type>
  <title>Enhanced error handling in handleSpecialistProxy for dual modes</title>
  <subtitle>Error messages distinguish initial activation vs continuation, proxy state cleaned up on initial activation failure</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>rateLimitedUntil changed from direct number comparison to function call rateLimitedUntil() in editNow streaming logic</fact>
    <fact>Error handling now distinguishes between initial activation ("初始回覆") and continuation ("回覆") based on startTarget presence</fact>
    <fact>Initial activation failures now call endProxy(chatId) to clean up partial proxy state and prevent users being stuck in limbo</fact>
    <fact>Continuation errors keep proxy active to allow retry without tearing down the session</fact>
    <fact>Error reply wrapped in .catch(() => {}) to prevent secondary failures from propagating</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The handleSpecialistProxy function received error handling enhancements to properly support its dual-mode operation. The rateLimitedUntil parameter is now invoked as a function, allowing callers to provide fresh rate-limit checks during streaming edits. More importantly, error handling now behaves differently based on whether the proxy is being initially activated or is in continuation mode. Initial activation failures tear down the proxy session (calling endProxy) to prevent users from being stuck in a half-started state where the proxy flag is set but no specialist is actually running. Continuation errors, however, keep the proxy active since the session is already established and the user can retry. Error messages also distinguish between the two modes for clearer user feedback.</narrative>

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Full inline proxy handler in index.ts analyzed</title>
  <subtitle>Lines 792-949 contain 158-line duplicate of relay.ts handleSpecialistProxy logic for continuation mode</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>index.ts lines 792-949 contain complete inline specialist proxy handler (158 lines) for continuation mode</fact>
    <fact>Logic includes streaming with editNow throttling, HTML/plain fallback rendering, token transformation, file/sticker/skill handling, ASK keyboards, and proxyDone auto-exit</fact>
    <fact>Uses estimateTokens() directly from misc.ts instead of receiving it as parameter like relay.ts version</fact>
    <fact>Uses rateLimitedUntil() function call matching the updated relay.ts signature</fact>
    <fact>Error handling doesn't distinguish initial vs continuation mode (always reports "回覆失敗") and doesn't clean up proxy state on failure</fact>
    <fact>Passes parseDuration, parseAbsoluteTime, parseRecurrence, computeNextRunAt to transformReplyTokens from enclosing scope</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The complete inline proxy handler in index.ts (lines 792-949) is nearly identical to the enhanced handleSpecialistProxy function in relay.ts, confirming extensive code duplication. This 158-line block handles the continuation mode - when users send messages while a specialist proxy is already active. The implementation includes all the same features: streaming with throttled message edits, markdown-to-HTML rendering with plain-text fallback, token extraction and transformation, file/sticker/skill output handling, ASK keyboard generation, context usage stats, and automatic exit on PROXY_DONE. Key differences from relay.ts: it uses estimateTokens() directly rather than via parameter injection, and it lacks the dual-mode error handling that distinguishes initial activation from continuation failures. This is the primary candidate for replacement with a handleSpecialistProxy() call.</narrative>

This is a major refactoring - the user is replacing the 158-line inline specialist proxy handler in index.ts with a simple call to handleSpecialistProxy. This eliminates one of the three duplicate implementations identified earlier.

The replacement:
- Removes 158 lines of duplicate logic (lines 792-949)
- Replaces with a 12-line call to handleSpecialistProxy
- Passes all necessary parameters: chatId, text, ctx, streamEditIntervalMs, rateLimitedUntil, parseDuration, parseAbsoluteTime, parseRecurrence, computeNextRunAt, estimateTokens
- Note: does NOT pass startTarget, so it defaults to undefined, which means this is continuation mode (the proxy must already be active)

This is exactly what the refactoring was designed to do - consolidate the duplicate logic into a single shared function.

  <narrative>The index.ts message handler's inline specialist proxy logic has been replaced with a call to the consolidated handleSpecialistProxy function from relay.ts. The 158-line duplicate implementation that handled continuation mode (user messages sent while proxy is active) is now a simple 12-line function invocation. All required parameters are passed from the message handler's scope: timing configuration, rate limit accessor, time parsing functions, token estimation, and recurrence computation. The startTarget parameter is omitted, defaulting to undefined, which signals continuation mode to handleSpecialistProxy - the function will check isProxyActive and return false if no proxy session exists, or proceed with the specialist exchange if active. This consolidation eliminates the first of three duplicate proxy implementations, reducing maintenance burden and ensuring consistent behavior across call sites.</narrative>

content.thinking:
TypeScript compilation errors found. There are signature mismatches between what's being passed and what ProxyHandlerOpts expects.

Two issues:
1. `computeNextRunAt` signature mismatch - the interface expects `(r: any, after?: number) => number | null` but is getting `(rec: Recurrence, from: number) => number | null` (from is required, not optional)

2. `estimateTokens` signature mismatch - the interface expects `(x: string | number) => number` but is getting an overloaded function `{ (text: string): number; (chars: number): number; }`

These errors are in both index.ts and run-prompt.ts at the call sites.

The problem is that ProxyHandlerOpts was defined with specific signatures that don't match the actual functions being passed. This needs to be fixed in the interface definition.

\\\".jpg\\\" : \\\"\\\");\\n const ts = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, \\\"-\\\").slice(0, 19);\\n const localName = `relay-delegate-${from}-${ts}${ext}`;\\n const uploadsDir = path.join(process.env.ACP_SESSION_CWD || process.cwd(), \\\"uploads\\\");\\n const localPath = path.join(uploadsDir, localName);\\n const fileUrl = `https://api.telegram.org/file/bot${bot.token}/${filePath}`;\\n const resp = await fetch(fileUrl);\\n if (!resp.ok) { console.error(\\\"[relay] RELAY_DELEGATE attachment download failed:\\\", resp.status); return; }\\n const buffer = Buffer.from(await resp.arrayBuffer());\\n await mkdir(uploadsDir, { recursive: true });\\n await writeFile(localPath, buffer);\\n console.log(`[relay] ✓ RELAY_DELEGATE attachment saved from \\\"${from}\\\": ${localPath}`);\\n\\n const userId = config.allowedUserIds[0] ?? 0;\\n const relayChatId = config.relay!.groupChatId;\\n notifyRelayOwner(bot, userId, `📋 收到「${from}」的委派任務與附件：${d.goal}`, `delegate attachment from ${from}`);\\n const relayText = buildRelayDelegationPrompt(from, d, localPath);\\n const { runPrompt, sessions } = deps();\\n const fakeCtx = {\\n chat: { id: relayChatId, type: \\\"supergroup\\\" as const },\\n from: { id: userId, is_bot: false, first_name: from },\\n message: { message_id: 0, date: 0, chat: { id: relayChatId, type: \\\"supergroup\\\" as const }, text: relayText },\\n api: bot.api,\\n reply: (text: string, extra?: any) => bot.api.sendMessage(relayChatId, text, extra),\\n } as unknown as Context;\\n const session = await sessions.get(relayChatId, userId);\\n await runPrompt(fakeCtx, session, relayText, { kind: \\\"relay\\\", replyTo: from });\\n } catch (err) {\\n console.error(`[relay] RELAY_DELEGATE attachment handling failed:`, err);\\n }\\n return;\\n }\\n\\n // RELAY_INPUT\\n if (isRelayInput) {\\n try {\\n const file = await bot.api.getFile(fileId);\\n const filePath = file.file_path;\\n if (!filePath) { console.warn(\\\"[relay] RELAY_INPUT file has no file_path\\\"); return; }\\n const ext = path.extname(filePath) || (fileType === \\\"photo\\\" ? \\\".jpg\\\" : \\\"\\\");\\n const ts = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, \\\"-\\\").slice(0, 19);\\n const localName = `relay-input-${from}-${ts}${ext}`;\\n const uploadsDir = path.join(process.env.ACP_SESSION_CWD || process.cwd(), \\\"uploads\\\");\\n const localPath = path.join(uploadsDir, localName);\\n const fileUrl = `https://api.telegram.org/file/bot${bot.token}/${filePath}`;\\n const resp = await fetch(fileUrl);\\n if (!resp.ok) { console.error(\\\"[relay] RELAY_INPUT download failed:\\\", resp.status); return; }\\n const buffer = Buffer.from(await resp.arrayBuffer());\\n await mkdir(uploadsDir, { recursive: true });\\n await writeFile(localPath, buffer);\\n console.log(`[relay] ✓ RELAY_INPUT saved from \\\"${from}\\\": ${localPath}`);\\n const { runPrompt, sessions } = deps();\\n const session = await sessions.get(ownerChatId, ownerChatId);\\n const prompt =\\n `[系統] 收到「${from}」透過 relay 傳來的參考圖片（RELAY_INPUT），已存到：${localPath}\\\\n` +\\n `這是委派任務的參考輸入，不是產出。請在後續生圖時參考此檔案。`;\\n await runPrompt(\\n { chat: { id: ownerChatId, type: \\\"private\\\" as const }, from: { id: ownerChatId, is_bot: false, first_name: from }, message: { message_id: 0, date: 0, chat: { id: ownerChatId, type: \\\"private\\\" as const }, text: \\\"\\\" }, api: bot.api, reply: (text: string, extra?: any) => bot.api.sendMessage(ownerChatId, text, extra) } as unknown as Context,\\n session, prompt, { kind: \\\"meta\\\", silent: true },\\n );\\n } catch (err) {\\n console.error(`[relay] RELAY_INPUT handling failed:`, err);\\n }\\n return;\\n }\\n\\n // RELAY_OUTPUT\\n const isRelayOutput = m.caption?.includes(\\\"[RELAY_OUTPUT]\\\");\\n if (isRelayOutput) {\\n try {\\n const file = await bot.api.getFile(fileId);\\n const filePath = file.file_path;\\n if (!filePath) { console.warn(\\\"[relay] RELAY_OUTPUT file has no file_path\\\"); return; }\\n const ext = path.extname(filePath) || (fileType === \\\"photo\\\" ? \\\".jpg\\\" : \\\"\\\");\\n const ts = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, \\\"-\\\").slice(0, 19);\\n const localName = `relay-output-${from}-${ts}${ext}`;\\n const uploadsDir = path.join(process.env.ACP_SESSION_CWD || process.cwd(), \\\"uploads\\\");\\n const localPath = path.join(uploadsDir, localName);\\n const fileUrl = `https://api.telegram.org/file/bot${bot.token}/${filePath}`;\\n const resp = await fetch(fileUrl);\\n if (!resp.ok) { console.error(\\\"[relay] RELAY_OUTPUT download failed:\\\", resp.status); return; }\\n const buffer = Buffer.from(await resp.arrayBuffer());\\n await mkdir(uploadsDir, { recursive: true });\\n await writeFile(localPath, buffer);\\n console.log(`[relay] ✓ RELAY_OUTPUT saved from \\\"${from}\\\": ${localPath}`);\\n const extLower = path.extname(localPath).toLowerCase();\\n const asPhoto = IMG_EXT.has(extLower) && extLower !== \\\".png\\\" && buffer.length <= 10 * 1024 * 1024;\\n const caption = `📨 [relay output from ${from}]`;\\n if (asPhoto) {\\n await bot.api.sendPhoto(ownerChatId, new InputFile(localPath), { caption });\\n } else {\\n await bot.api.sendDocument(ownerChatId, new InputFile(localPath), { caption });\\n }\\n console.log(`[relay] ✓ forwarded RELAY_OUTPUT from \\\"${from}\\\" to owner: ${localPath}`);\\n } catch (err) {\\n console.error(`[relay] RELAY_OUTPUT handling failed:`, err);\\n }\\n return;\\n }\\n\\n // Normal relay file: forward to user\\n const caption = `📨 [relay file from ${from}]${m.caption ? \\\"\\\\n\\\" + m.caption : \\\"\\\"}`;\\n let sent = false;\\n try {\\n if (fileType === \\\"photo\\\") {\\n await bot.api.sendPhoto(ownerChatId, fileId, { caption });\\n } else {\\n await bot.api.sendDocument(ownerChatId, fileId, { caption });\\n }\\n sent = true;\\n console.log(`[relay] ✓ forwarded file from bot \\\"${from}\\\" to owner`);\\n } catch (err) {\\n console.error(`[relay] failed to forward file from bot \\\"${from}\\\":`, err);\\n }\\n if (sent) {\\n const { runPrompt, sessions } = deps();\\n const userId = ownerChatId;\\n sessions.get(ownerChatId, userId).then((session) => {\\n const prompt =\\n `[系統] 收到「${from}」透過 relay 傳來的${fileType === \\\"photo\\\" ? \\\"圖片\\\" : \\\"檔案\\\"}，已自動轉發給使用者。` +\\n (m.caption ? `\\\\n附帶說明：${m.caption}` : \\\"\\\") +\\n `\\\\n如果這是委派任務的產出，請告知使用者圖片已送達。`;\\n runPrompt(\\n { chat: { id: ownerChatId, type: \\\"private\\\" as const }, from: { id: userId, is_bot: false, first_name: from }, message: { message_id: 0, date: 0, chat: { id: ownerChatId, type: \\\"private\\\" as const }, text: \\\"\\\" }, api: bot.api, reply: (text: string, extra?: any) => bot.api.sendMessage(ownerChatId, text, extra) } as unknown as Context,\\n session, prompt, { kind: \\\"meta\\\", silent: false },\\n ).catch((err) => console.error(`[relay] file notify prompt failed:`, err));\\n }).catch((err) => console.error(\\\"[relay] file notify session get failed:\\\", err));\\n }\\n });\\n}\\n\\n\\n// ─── Relay poller initialization ────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n/**\\n * Initialize the relay poller (called from main() during startup).\\n */\\nexport function initRelayPoller(bot: Bot): void {\\n if (!config.relay) return;\\n const relayConfig = config.relay;\\n relayLoopGuard = new RelayLoopGuard({\\n maxTurns: relayConfig.maxConsecutiveTurns,\\n doneBlockMs: 300_000,\\n });\\n startRelayPoller(bot, relayConfig, async (msg) => {\\n if (relayConfig.transport !== \\\"telegram\\\") ensurePollerRunning();\\n if (process.env.RELAY_PAUSED === \\\"true\\\") return;\\n const guard = relayLoopGuard;\\n if (!guard) return;\\n const parsedEarly = parseRelayPayload(msg.text);\\n const isDelegation = parsedEarly?.type === \\\"delegate\\\";\\n const decision = guard.allowIncoming(msg.from);\\n if (decision.action === \\\"blocked-done\\\" && !isDelegation) {\\n console.log(`[relay] done guard: skipping inject from \\\"${msg.from}\\\" until ${new Date(decision.until).toISOString()}`);\\n const peer = msg.from;\\n const chatId = relayConfig.groupChatId;\\n const userId = config.allowedUserIds[0] ?? 0;\\n const { runPrompt, sessions } = deps();\\n sessions.get(chatId, userId).then((session) => {\\n const fakeCtx = {\\n chat: { id: chatId, type: \\\"supergroup\\\" as const },\\n from: { id: userId, is_bot: false, first_name: peer },\\n message: { message_id: 0, date: 0, chat: { id: chatId, type: \\\"supergroup\\\" as const }, text: \\\"\\\" },\\n api: bot.api,\\n reply: (text: string, extra?: any) => bot.api.sendMessage(chatId, text, extra),\\n } as unknown as Context;\\n const summaryPrompt =\\n `[系統] 你剛才與「${peer}」的 relay 對話已結束（對方先發了 RELAY_DONE）。` +\\n `請用一句話摘要這次 relay 對話的重點，然後呼叫 remember() 存下來。` +\\n `格式範例：remember(\\\"[relay ${peer}] …摘要內容…\\\")。` +\\n `不需要回覆其他內容。`;\\n runPrompt(fakeCtx, session, summaryPrompt, { kind: \\\"meta\\\", silent: true }).catch((err) => {\\n console.error(`[relay] peer-done remember meta prompt failed:`, err);\\n });\\n }).catch((err) => console.error(\\\"[relay] peer-done session get failed:\\\", err));\\n return;\\n }\\n if (decision.action === \\\"blocked-max\\\") {\\n console.log(`[relay] idle-loop guard: ${decision.turns}/${decision.maxTurns} consecutive turns, permanently blocked from \\\"${msg.from}\\\"`);\\n const privateChatId = config.allowedUserIds[0] ?? 0;\\n if (privateChatId) {\\n bot.api.sendMessage(privateChatId, `⚠️ 與「${msg.from}」的 relay 已達 ${decision.maxTurns} 輪上限，已永久暫停。輸入 /relay reopen 解除。`).catch(() => {});\\n }\\n return;\\n }\\n\\n const parsed = parseRelayPayload(msg.text);\\n const userId = config.allowedUserIds[0] ?? 0;\\n const privateChatId = userId;\\n const chatId = relayConfig.groupChatId;\\n const { runPrompt, sessions } = deps();\\n\\n let relayText: string;\\n let promptKind: \\\"relay\\\" | \\\"meta\\\" = \\\"relay\\\";\\n\\n if (parsed?.type === \\\"delegate\\\") {\\n const d = parsed.payload;\\n notifyRelayOwner(bot, privateChatId, `📋 收到「${msg.from}」的委派任務：${d.goal}`, `delegate from ${msg.from}`);\\n relayText = buildRelayDelegationPrompt(msg.from, d);\\n } else if (parsed?.type === \\\"result\\\") {\\n const r = parsed.payload;\\n completeTask(r.id, r.status === \\\"done\\\" ? \\\"done\\\" : r.status === \\\"timeout\\\" ? \\\"timeout\\\" : \\\"failed\\\");\\n bot.api.sendMessage(privateChatId, `✅ 收到「${msg.from}」的委派結果 [${r.id}]: ${r.status}`).catch(() => {});\\n const delegationCtx = await loadDelegationContext(r.id);\\n relayText =\\n delegationCtx +\\n `[系統] Relay Delegation 結果回傳\\\\n` +\\n `來源：${msg.from}\\\\n` +\\n `任務 ID：${r.id}\\\\n` +\\n `狀態：${r.status}\\\\n` +\\n `摘要：${r.summary}\\\\n\\\\n` +\\n `上述是你之前委派給「${msg.from}」的任務結果。請根據此結果繼續你之前的工作。` +\\n `不需要回覆對方，直接對使用者報告進度或繼續下一步。`;\\n promptKind = \\\"meta\\\";\\n relayLoopGuard?.markDone(msg.from);\\n } else {\\n if (\\\"turns\\\" in decision && decision.turns === 1) {\\n bot.api.sendMessage(privateChatId, `💬 正在與「${msg.from}」relay 對話中…`).catch(() => {});\\n }\\n relayText = `[Relay from agent \\\"${msg.from}\\\"] 以下是另一個 AI agent「${msg.from}」透過 relay 傳來的訊息，請以你自己的身份回應（不要複製對方的話）。若對話已無需繼續（確認完畢、無待辦事項），在回覆中加 <> 結束 relay 對話（必須裸寫，不可包在 backtick 或 code block 內，否則不會生效）：\\\\n${msg.text}`;\\n }\\n\\n const targetChatId = promptKind === \\\"meta\\\" ? privateChatId : chatId;\\n const targetChatType = promptKind === \\\"meta\\\" ? \\\"private\\\" as const : \\\"supergroup\\\" as const;\\n const fakeCtx = {\\n chat: { id: targetChatId, type: targetChatType },\\n from: { id: userId, is_bot: false, first_name: msg.from },\\n message: { message_id: 0, date: 0, chat: { id: targetChatId, type: targetChatType }, text: relayText },\\n api: bot.api,\\n reply: (text: string, extra?: any) => bot.api.sendMessage(targetChatId, text, extra),\\n } as unknown as Context;\\n sessions.get(targetChatId, userId).then((session) => {\\n if (promptKind === \\\"meta\\\") {\\n runPrompt(fakeCtx, session, relayText, { kind: \\\"meta\\\" });\\n } else {\\n runPrompt(fakeCtx, session, relayText, { kind: \\\"relay\\\", replyTo: msg.from });\\n }\\n }).catch((err) => console.error(\\\"[relay] inject failed:\\\", err));\\n });\\n console.log(`[relay] enabled — bot name: ${relayConfig.botName}`);\\n}\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":92,\"oldLines\":8,\"newStart\":92,\"newLines\":8,\"lines\":[\" parseDuration: (s: string) => number | null;\",\" parseAbsoluteTime: (s: string) => Date | null;\",\" parseRecurrence: (s: string) => any;\",\"- computeNextRunAt: (r: any, after?: number) => number | null;\",\"- estimateTokens: (x: string | number) => number;\",\"+ computeNextRunAt: (r: any, after: number) => number | null;\",\"+ estimateTokens: (chars: number) => number;\",\" /** When set, this call STARTS proxy mode for this specialist (initial\",\" * activation via `<>`). specialist proxy,\\n * relay token dispatch, parallel delegate dispatch, relay poller init.\\n */\\nimport type { Bot, Context } from \\\"grammy\\\";\\nimport { InputFile } from RelayLoopGuard | null = null;\\n\\nexport function getRelayLoopGuard(): RelayLoopGuard | null {\\n return relayLoopGuard;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Re-exports from working-state ──────────────────────────────────────────\\nimport {\\n extractMemoryTokensFromProxy, stripMemoryTokens,\\n saveDelegationContext, loadDelegationContext,\\n} from notifyRelayOwner(bot: Bot, chatId: number, text: string, context: string): void {\\n if (!chatId) return;\\n bot.api.sendMessage(chatId, text).catch((err) => {\\n console.error(`[relay] owner notification failed (${context}):`, err);\\n });\\n}\\n\\nexport function buildRelayDelegationPrompt(from: string, d: DelegatePayload, attachmentPath?: string): string {\\n return (\\n `[Relay Delegation from \\\"${from}\\\" — id: ${d.id}]\\\\n` +\\n `你收到一個任務委派，請完成後回傳結果。\\\\n` +\\n `目標：${d.goal}\\\\n` +\\n (d.context ? `背景：${d.context}\\\\n` : \\\"\\\") +\\n (attachmentPath ? `參考檔案：${attachmentPath}\\\\n` : \\\"\\\") +\\n `如果任務產出了檔案（圖片等），請用 <> 傳回給委派方，再發 RELAY_RESULT。\\\\n` +\\n `完成時請在回覆中加入：<>\\\\n` +\\n `若無法完成：<>\\\\n` +\\n `不要加 RELAY_DONE，RELAY_RESULT 會自動結束對話。`\\n );\\n}\\n\\n\\n// ─── Specialist proxy handler ───────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ProxyHandlerOpts {\\n chatId: number;\\n /** Message to send to the specialist (a user message in continuation mode,\\n * or the `<>` payload in initial-activation mode). */\\n text: string;\\n ctx: Context;\\n streamEditIntervalMs: number;\\n /** Fresh accessor — re-checked on each streaming edit so a rate-limit that\\n * lifts mid-stream is picked up. */\\n rateLimitedUntil: () => number;\\n parseDuration: (s: string) => number | null;\\n parseAbsoluteTime: (s: string) => Date | null;\\n parseRecurrence: (s: string) => any;\\n computeNextRunAt: (r: any, after?: number) => number | null;\\n estimateTokens: (x: string | number) => number;\\n /** When set, this call STARTS proxy mode for this specialist (initial\\n * activation via `<>`). When omitted, proxy must already\\n * be active (continuation: a user message while in proxy mode). */\\n startTarget?: string;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * Drive one specialist-proxy exchange: send `text` to the specialist, stream\\n * its reply to the user (HTML with plain-text fallback), process its output\\n * tokens (files / stickers / skills / ASK), and auto-exit on `<>`.\\n *\\n * Two call modes:\\n * - Initial activation (`startTarget` set): starts proxy mode first. Used by\\n * the `<>` token path in run-prompt.ts.\\n * - Continuation (`startTarget` omitted): proxy must already be active; a\\n * user message routed to the specialist. Used by the message handler.\\n *\\n * Returns true if handled, false if not in proxy mode (continuation only).\\n */\\nexport async function handleSpecialistProxy(opts: ProxyHandlerOpts): Promise {\\n const { chatId, text, ctx, streamEditIntervalMs, rateLimitedUntil, startTarget } = opts;\\n if (startTarget) {\\n startProxy(chatId, startTarget);\\n } else if (!isProxyActive(chatId)) {\\n return false;\\n }\\n\\n const target = getProxyTarget(chatId)!;\\n try {\\n // Mirror the main agent: render specialist output as Telegram HTML, with a\\n // plain-text fallback (strip tags) when HTML parsing fails.\\n const htmlPrefix = `🤖 [${target}]\\\\n`;\\n const plainPrefix = `🤖 [${target}]\\\\n`;\\n const placeholder = await ctx.reply(`${htmlPrefix}Thinking… ▍`, { parse_mode: \\\"HTML\\\" })\\n .catch(() => ctx.reply(`${plainPrefix}Thinking… ▍`));\\n\\n let lastEditAt = 0;\\n let lastRendered = \\\"\\\";\\n let editTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\\n\\n const editNow = async (content: string) => {\\n if (rateLimitedUntil() > Date.now()) return;\\n const body = content.length > TG_MAX ? content.thinking:
The user is fixing the TypeScript compilation errors by updating the ProxyHandlerOpts interface signature. They:

1. Changed `computeNextRunAt: (r: any, after?: number) => number | null;` to `computeNextRunAt: (r: any, after: number) => number | null;` - making the after parameter required instead of optional
2. Changed `estimateTokens: (x: string | number) => number;` to `estimateTokens: (chars: number) => number;` - changing from union type to single number type

This aligns the interface with the actual function signatures being passed from the call sites. The computeNextRunAt now matches the ScheduleParsers interface, and estimateTokens is changed to only accept numbers (since the function is overloaded and TypeScript needs a specific signature when passing as a parameter).

<observation>
  <type>bugfix</type>
  <title>ProxyHandlerOpts interface signatures corrected to match actual function types</title>
  <subtitle>Fixed computeNextRunAt after parameter from optional to required and estimateTokens to accept only numbers</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>computeNextRunAt signature changed from (r: any, after?: number) to (r: any, after: number) - after parameter now required, matching ScheduleParsers interface</fact>
    <fact>estimateTokens signature changed from (x: string | number) to (chars: number) - single number parameter instead of union type</fact>
    <fact>Changes resolve 4 TypeScript compilation errors (2 in index.ts, 2 in run-prompt.ts)</fact>
    <fact>estimateTokens has overloaded signatures in misc.ts, but when passed as function parameter TypeScript requires single specific signature</fact>
    <fact>Both call sites already pass numeric values (proxyStats.charsIn, proxyStats.charsOut) to estimateTokens, so number signature is correct</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The ProxyHandlerOpts interface signatures were updated to match the actual function types being passed at call sites. The computeNextRunAt parameter after was changed from optional (after?: number) to required (after: number), aligning with the ScheduleParsers interface definition where this parameter is always provided. The estimateTokens signature was narrowed from a union type (x: string | number) to accept only numbers (chars: number). While the actual estimateTokens function in misc.ts uses overloaded signatures accepting both string and number, when passed as a function parameter TypeScript requires a single consistent signature. Since both call sites in handleSpecialistProxy pass numeric values (character counts from proxy stats), the number-only signature is appropriate and resolves the type errors.</narrative>
