retrieveWikiPages(text);\\n      // Per-session dedup: skip pages already injected in a prior turn.\\n      const fresh = hits.filter((h) => !session.injectedWikiSlugs.has(h.slug));\\n      if (fresh.length > 0) {\\n        for (const h of fresh) {\\n          wikiHitSlugs.add(h.slug);\\n          session.injectedWikiSlugs.add(h.slug);\\n        }\\n        promptText = formatWikiBlock(fresh) + promptText;\\n      }\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.warn(\\\"[wiki-retrieval] failed:\\\", err);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // Memory recall: inject semantically relevant topic shard facts.\\n  if (!_skipEnrichment && isMemoryRecallReady() && ctx.from?.id) {\\n    try {\\n      const hits = await recallRelevantFacts(\\n        text, ctx.from.id, session.tailFacts, wikiHitSlugs,\\n      );\\n      if (hits.length > 0) {\\n        promptText = formatRecallBlock(hits) + promptText;\\n      }\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.warn(\\\"[memory-recall] failed:\\\", err);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // Skill routing: hint which skills are most relevant.\\n  if (!_skipEnrichment && isSkillRouterReady()) {\\n    try {\\n      const hits = await routeToSkills(text);\\n      // Per-session dedup: skip skills already injected in a prior turn.\\n      const fresh = hits.filter((h) => !session.injectedSkills.has(h.name));\\n      if (fresh.length > 0) {\\n        for (const h of fresh) {\\n          logHit(\\\"skill\\\", h.name, \\\"skill-routing\\\");\\n          session.injectedSkills.add(h.name);\\n        }\\n        promptText = formatSkillHint(fresh) + promptText;\\n      }\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.warn(\\\"[skill-router] failed:\\\", err);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // Intent classification: suggest /command if message looks like a command intent.\\n  if (!_skipEnrichment && isIntentClassifierReady()) {\\n    try {\\n      const hit = await classifyIntent(text);\\n      if (hit) {\\n        promptText =\\n          `[Intent hint — user message may be requesting: ${hit.usage} (score ${hit.score.toFixed(2)})]\\\\n` +\\n          `If the user is asking you to perform this action, tell them to use ${hit.usage} directly.\\\\n` +\\n          `[End intent hint]\\\\n\\\\n` + promptText;\\n      } else if (config.localLlmIntentFallback && session.activeProvider !== \\\"local\\\" && text.length > 25 && text.length <= 80) {\\n        // Embedding classifier skips long messages — try LLM for 25-80 char range\\n        const t0 = Date.now();\\n        const cmds = COMMAND_SPECS.map(c => ({ name: c.name, desc: c.desc }));\\n        const labels = await classifyIntentLLM(text, cmds);\\n        console.log(`[intent-llm] ${labels.length ? labels[0].intent : \\\"none\\\"} (${Date.now() - t0}ms)`);\\n        if (labels.length > 0) {\\n          const spec = COMMAND_SPECS.find(c => c.name === labels[0].intent);\\n          if (spec) {\\n            promptText =\\n              `[Intent hint — user message may be requesting: ${spec.usage} (LLM confidence ${labels[0].confidence.toFixed(2)})]\\\\n` +\\n              `If the user is asking you to perform this action, tell them to use ${spec.usage} directly.\\\\n` +\\n              `[End intent hint]\\\\n\\\\n` + promptText;\\n          }\\n        }\\n      }\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.warn(\\\"[intent-classifier] failed:\\\", err);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // Prepend specialist routing hint if pre-filter matched\\n  if (specialistHint) {\\n    promptText = specialistHint + promptText;\\n  }\\n\\n  // 5d: User negation reflexion hint — when the user expresses\\n  // dissatisfaction (\\\"不對\\\", \\\"重做\\\", \\\"wrong\\\", etc.), prepend a\\n  // reflection hint so the agent self-corrects instead of repeating.\\n  const negationRe = /^(不對|不是|錯了|重做|重來|再試|wrong|redo|no that'?s wrong|try again|那不對|這不對)/i;\\n  if (negationRe.test(promptText.trim())) {\\n    promptText =\\n      `[Reflexion hint — user indicated your previous response was incorrect. ` +\\n      `Before answering, briefly reflect: what was wrong in your last response? ` +\\n      `What assumption should you revise? Then provide a corrected answer.]\\\\n\\\\n` +\\n      promptText;\\n  }\\n\\n  const enrichmentMs = Date.now() - _enrichStart;\\n  if (enrichmentMs > 500) {\\n    console.log(`[enrichment] total pipeline: ${enrichmentMs}ms`);\\n  }\\n\\n  await runPrompt(ctx, session, promptText);\\n});\\n\\n// ─── Bot-to-bot relay incoming file → commands/relay.ts ────────────────────\\nsetupRelayFileHandler(bot);\\n// File uploads: download into ACP_SESSION_CWD/uploads/, then hand Kiro\\n// a prompt that tells it where to find the file.\\nbot.on([\\n  \\\"message:document\\\",\\n  \\\"message:photo\\\",\\n  \\\"message:voice\\\",\\n  \\\"message:audio\\\",\\n  \\\"message:video\\\",\\n], async (ctx) => {\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) {\\n    await ctx.reply(\\\"Not authorized.\\\");\\n    return;\\n  }\\n  const chatId = ctx.chat.id;\\n  let session: ChatSession;\\n  try {\\n    session = await sessions.get(chatId, ctx.from?.id);\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    await ctx.reply(\\n      `Failed to start Kiro agent: ${(err as Error).message}`\\n    );\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  // Pick the best file object out of the various message kinds.\\n  const m = ctx.message;\\n  const photo = m.photo?.[m.photo.length - 1]; // largest\\n  const src =\\n    m.document ??\\n    photo ??\\n    m.voice ??\\n    m.audio ??\\n    m.video;\\n  if (!src) return;\\n\\n  let origName =\\n    (m.document?.file_name as string | undefined) ??\\n    (m.audio?.file_name as string | undefined) ??\\n    (m.video?.file_name as string | undefined);\\n  if (!origName) {\\n    const ext =\\n      m.photo ? \\\".jpg\\\" :\\n      m.voice ? \\\".ogg\\\" :\\n      m.audio ? \\\".mp3\\\" :\\n      m.video ? \\\".mp4\\\" : \\\"\\\";\\n    origName = `${src.file_unique_id}${ext}`;\\n  }\\n  const safeName = sanitizeName(origName);\\n  const ts = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, \\\"-\\\").slice(0, 19);\\n  const relPath = path.join(\\\"uploads\\\", `${chatId}-${ts}-${safeName}`);\\n  const absPath = path.join(config.sessionCwd, relPath);\\n\\n  let notice: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ctx.reply>> | null = null;\\n  try {\\n    notice = await ctx.reply(`Downloading ${safeName}…`);\\n    const file = await ctx.api.getFile(src.file_id);\\n    const url = `https://api.telegram.org/file/bot${config.telegramToken}/${file.file_path}`;\\n    await downloadToFile(url, absPath);\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    const msg = `Failed to download: ${(err as Error).message}`;\\n    if (notice) {\\n      try { await ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, notice.message_id, msg); }\\n      catch { await ctx.reply(msg); }\\n    } else {\\n      await ctx.reply(msg);\\n    }\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  const caption = (m.caption ?? \\\"\\\").trim();\\n\\n  const promptText =\\n    `User uploaded a file via Telegram.\\\\n` +\\n    `Path (relative to cwd): ${relPath.replace(/\\\\\\\\/g, \\\"/\\\")}\\\\n` +\\n    `Original name: ${origName}\\\\n` +\\n    (caption ? `User caption: ${caption}\\\\n` : \\\"\\\") +\\n    (DOC_CONVERTIBLE_EXTS.has(path.extname(absPath).toLowerCase())\\n      ? `Hint: This format can be converted to markdown with: py scripts/doc-to-md.py \\\"${absPath}\\\"\\\\n`\\n      : \\\"\\\") +\\n    `Please inspect it and help accordingly.`;\\n\\n  if (notice) {\\n    try {\\n      await ctx.api.editMessageText(\\n        chatId,\\n        notice.message_id,\\n        `Saved → ${relPath.replace(/\\\\\\\\/g, \\\"/\\\")}`\\n      );\\n    } catch { /* ignore */ }\\n  }\\n\\n  session._lastUploadPath = absPath;\\n  await runPrompt(ctx, session, promptText);\\n});\\n\\nbot.catch((err) => {\\n  console.error(\\\"Bot error:\\\", err);\\n});\\n\\nasync function main() {\\n  console.log(`Starting Telegram ↔ Kiro bridge`);\\n  console.log(`  agent: ${config.agent.command} ${config.agent.args.join(\\\" \\\")}`);\\n  console.log(`  cwd:   ${config.sessionCwd}`);\\n  console.log(`  PATH:  ${process.env.PATH ?? \\\"(empty)\\\"}`);\\n  console.log(`  Path:  ${process.env.Path ?? \\\"(empty)\\\"}`);\\n  console.log(`  PATH===Path: ${process.env.PATH === process.env.Path}`);\\n  console.log(\\n    `  auth:  ${\\n      config.allowedUserIds.length\\n        ? `restricted to ${config.allowedUserIds.join(\\\", \\\")}`\\n        : \\\"open to anyone\\\"\\n    }`\\n  );\\n  // Ensure topics.json exists. Seeds built-in defaults on first run so\\n  // users can edit it without rebuilding.\\n  try {\\n    const { created, file } = bootstrapTopicsFile();\\n    console.log(\\n      `  topics: ${file}${created ? \\\" (created from defaults)\\\" : \\\"\\\"} — active source: ${topicRulesSource()}`\\n    );\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[topic-rules] bootstrap failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Initialize embedding-based NotebookLM router (non-blocking on failure).\\n  try {\\n    const routingPath = path.join(detectAgentConfigDir(), \\\"notebooklm-routing.json\\\");\\n    const raw = await readFile(routingPath, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n    const routing = JSON.parse(raw);\\n    if (routing.version === 2) {\\n      await initEmbedRouter(routing);\\n    } else {\\n      console.log(\\\"[embed-router] skipped: routing.json is not v2\\\");\\n    }\\n  } catch (err: any) {\\n    if (err?.code === \\\"ENOENT\\\") {\\n      console.log(\\\"[embed-router] skipped: notebooklm-routing.json not found\\\");\\n    } else {\\n      console.warn(\\\"[embed-router] init failed:\\\", err);\\n    }\\n  }\\n  // Initialize SQLite memory index (derived from facts .md).\\n  try {\\n    initMemoryDb();\\n    const uid = config.allowedUserIds[0] ?? 0;\\n    if (uid) {\\n      const { inserted, deleted } = syncFactsToDb(uid);\\n      console.log(`[memory-db] synced: +${inserted} -${deleted} facts`);\\n    }\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[memory-db] init failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Initialize memory recall (topic-based semantic retrieval).\\n  try {\\n    await initMemoryRecall();\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[memory-recall] init failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Initialize skill router (semantic skill matching).\\n  try {\\n    await initSkillRouter();\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[skill-router] init failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Initialize wiki retrieval (semantic wiki page matching).\\n  try {\\n    await initWikiRetrieval();\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[wiki-retrieval] init failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Initialize index retrieval (PageIndex tree-based document matching).\\n  try {\\n    const { initIndexRetrieval } = await import(\\\"./index-retrieval.js\\\");\\n    await initIndexRetrieval();\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[index-retrieval] init failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Initialize intent classifier (natural language → /command matching).\\n  try {\\n    await initIntentClassifier(COMMAND_SPECS.map((s) => ({ name: s.name, usage: s.usage, desc: s.desc })));\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[intent-classifier] init failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Auto-regenerate specialist configs from specialist-domains.json.\\n  try {\\n    const { expandDomains, applyExpansions } = await import(\\\"./specialist-review.js\\\");\\n    const expansions = await expandDomains();\\n    if (expansions.length > 0) {\\n      await applyExpansions(expansions);\\n      console.log(`[specialist] domain expansion: updated ${expansions.length} domain(s)`);\\n    }\\n    const { syncAllSpecialists } = await import(\\\"./specialist-create.js\\\");\\n    const synced = await syncAllSpecialists();\\n    if (synced > 0) console.log(`[specialist] auto-synced ${synced} domain(s) from specialist-domains.json`);\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[specialist] auto-sync failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Load local specialist config (same-machine agent instances).\\n  try {\\n    await loadSpecialistsConfig(detectAgentConfigDir());\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[specialist] config load failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Auto-start llama.cpp server if configured (non-blocking on failure).\\n  try {\\n    const { autoStartLlamaCpp } = await import(\\\"./local-llm.js\\\");\\n    await autoStartLlamaCpp();\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[local-llm] auto-start failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Start desktop pet WebSocket server (if PET_ENABLED=true).\\n  startPetServer();\\n  // Pet mini chat → inject into owner's live session\\n  onPetChat(async (text) => {\\n    const ownerId = config.allowedUserIds[0];\\n    if (!ownerId) return;\\n    try {\\n      const session = await sessions.get(ownerId, ownerId);\\n      // Build a minimal ctx that runPrompt can use to reply via Telegram\\n      const fakeCtx = {\\n        chat: { id: ownerId },\\n        from: { id: ownerId },\\n        message: undefined,\\n        api: bot.api,\\n        reply: (t: string, opts?: any) => bot.api.sendMessage(ownerId, t, opts),\\n      };\\n      await runPrompt(fakeCtx as any, session, `[from desktop pet] ${text}`);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.error(\\\"[pet-chat] runPrompt failed:\\\", err);\\n      petEmit({ type: \\\"state\\\", state: \\\"error\\\", text: \\\"處理失敗\\\" });\\n    }\\n  });\\n  await bot.start({\\n    onStart: async (me) => {\\n      console.log(`Bot online as @${me.username}`);\\n      // Start status monitoring server.\\n      startStatusServer(config.statusPort);\\n      // Publish the slash-command list so Telegram's Menu button (☰) shows it.\\n      registerBotCommands(bot).catch((err) =>\\n        console.error(\\\"[bot] registerBotCommands failed:\\\", err),\\n      );\\n      // Doctor Pattern: startup health check → notify user.\\n      runHealthCheck().then((results) => {\\n        const report = formatReport(results);\\n        console.log(\\\"[doctor]\\\", report.replace(/\\\\n/g, \\\" | \\\"));\\n        const chatId = config.allowedUserIds[0];\\n        if (chatId) bot.api.sendMessage(chatId, report).catch(() => {});\\n      }).catch((err) => console.error(\\\"[doctor] health check crashed:\\\", err));\\n      // Start bot-to-bot relay poller → commands/relay.ts\\n      initRelayPoller(bot);\\n      // Drain any pending fact-extractions that timed out in previous runs.\\n      // Fire-and-forget so bot startup isn't blocked on slow model calls.\\n      processPendingExtractions().catch((err) =>\\n        console.error(\\\"[memory] processPendingExtractions failed:\\\", err),\\n      );\\n      // Reload scheduled prompts. Any entries whose runAt already passed\\n      // during bridge downtime are skipped (policy: skip, not replay) and\\n      // reported back to their originating chat.\\n      try {\\n        const { upcoming, missed } = await scheduleStore.load();\\n\\n        // Seed default daily /dream schedule on first install\\n        const hasDream = scheduleStore.list().some(\\n          (e) => e.prompt === \\\"/dream\\\" && e.recurrence?.kind === \\\"daily\\\",\\n        );\\n        if (!hasDream && config.allowedUserIds.length > 0) {\\n          const primaryUser = config.allowedUserIds[0];\\n          const now = new Date();\\n          const runAt = new Date(now);\\n          runAt.setHours(4, 0, 0, 0);\\n          if (runAt.getTime() <= now.getTime()) runAt.setDate(runAt.getDate() + 1);\\n          await scheduleStore.add({\\n            chatId: primaryUser,\\n            userId: primaryUser,\\n            runAt: runAt.getTime(),\\n            prompt: \\\"/dream\\\",\\n            recurrence: { kind: \\\"daily\\\", hour: 4, minute: 0, second: 0 },\\n          });\\n          console.log(`[schedule] seeded default: daily 04:00 /dream for user ${primaryUser}`);\\n        }\\n\\n        scheduler.armAll();\\n        console.log(\\n          `[schedule] loaded ${upcoming.length} upcoming, ${missed.length} missed`,\\n        );\\n        const missedByChat = new Map<number, ScheduleEntry[]>();\\n        for (const e of missed) {\\n          const arr = missedByChat.get(e.chatId) ?? [];\\n          arr.push(e);\\n          missedByChat.set(e.chatId, arr);\\n        }\\n        for (const [chatId, entries] of missedByChat) {\\n          const lines = entries.map((e) => {\\n            const preview = e.prompt.length > 60 ? e.prompt.slice(0, 60) + \\\"…\\\" : e.prompt;\\n            return `• ${e.id} — ${new Date(e.runAt).toLocaleString()}\\\\n  ${preview}`;\\n          });\\n          await bot.api\\n            .sendMessage(\\n              chatId,\\n              `⚠️ bridge 重啟期間錯過 ${entries.length} 筆排程，依政策已略過：\\\\n${lines.join(\\\"\\\\n\\\")}`,\\n            )\\n            .catch((err) =>\\n              console.error(`[schedule] missed-notify to ${chatId} failed:`, err),\\n            );\\n        }\\n      } catch (err) {\\n        console.error(\\\"[schedule] load failed:\\\", err);\\n      }\\n      // If we were respawned by /restart, notify the requesting chat and\\n      // — if there's an active /goal on that chat with budget left — auto-\\n      // resume the continuation loop so the user doesn't have to send a\\n      // dummy message to wake it up. Policy:\\n      //   Q1 scope:  pending-only. We only auto-resume the chat that\\n      //              triggered /restart (marker.chatId). SIGINT / crash\\n      //              restarts won't auto-resume; user must poke manually.\\n      //   Q2 budget: keep turns_used as-is. The interrupted turn counts.\\n      //   Q3 trigger: auto-fire immediately after the \\\"✅ Bridge\\n      //              restarted.\\\" message — shared UI with /goal resume +\\n      //              auto-scheduled continuations (\\\"↻ Continuing (N/M)\\\").\\n      try {\\n        const raw = await readFile(RESTART_PENDING_FILE, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n        const marker = JSON.parse(raw) as {\\n          chatId: number;\\n          userId?: number;\\n          savedFilename?: string;\\n          savedCount?: number;\\n          reason?: string;\\n        };\\n        await unlink(RESTART_PENDING_FILE).catch(() => {});\\n        if (typeof marker.chatId === \\\"number\\\") {\\n          let msg = \\\"✅ Bridge restarted.\\\";\\n          if (marker.savedFilename && marker.savedCount) {\\n            msg += `\\\\nSaved ${marker.savedCount} messages → sessions/${marker.savedFilename}`;\\n          }\\n          if (marker.reason) {\\n            msg += `\\\\nReason: ${marker.reason}`;\\n          }\\n          await bot.api.sendMessage(marker.chatId, msg);\\n          // Auto-resume goal continuation. Runs after the restart ack so\\n          // if this throws the user still sees the \\\"✅\\\" message.\\n          // restartReason (C3) is propagated into the continuation prompt\\n          // so the post-restart first turn knows why it was restarted.\\n          await maybeAutoResumeGoalAfterRestart(\\n            marker.chatId,\\n            marker.userId,\\n            marker.reason,\\n          ).catch((err) => {\\n            console.error(\\n              `[restart] goal auto-resume for chat ${marker.chatId} failed:`,\\n              err,\\n            );\\n          });\\n        }\\n      } catch (err: any) {\\n        if (err?.code !== \\\"ENOENT\\\") {\\n          console.error(\\\"[restart] post-restart notify failed:\\\", err);\\n        }\\n      }\\n    },\\n  });\\n}\\n\\nconst shutdown = async (signal: string) => {\\n  console.log(`\\\\nReceived ${signal}, shutting down…`);\\n  try {\\n    scheduler.stop();\\n  } catch {\\n    /* noop */\\n  }\\n  try {\\n    await bot.stop();\\n  } catch {\\n    /* noop */\\n  }\\n  try {\\n    await withTimeout(\\n      sessions.shutdown(),\\n      config.memoryExtractTimeoutMs + 30_000,\\n      \\\"sessions.shutdown\\\",\\n    );\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.error(\\\"[shutdown] graceful shutdown failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  try { stopPetApp(); } catch { /* noop */ }\\n  process.exit(0);\\n};\\n\\nprocess.on(\\\"SIGINT\\\", () => shutdown(\\\"SIGINT\\\"));\\nprocess.on(\\\"SIGTERM\\\", () => shutdown(\\\"SIGTERM\\\"));\\n\\n// Last-resort crash handlers: log and exit non-zero so the outer\\n// start.bat loop (or any supervisor) restarts us.\\nprocess.on(\\\"uncaughtException\\\", (err) => {\\n  console.error(\\\"uncaughtException:\\\", err);\\n  process.exit(1);\\n});\\nprocess.on(\\\"unhandledRejection\\\", (reason) => {\\n  console.error(\\\"unhandledRejection:\\\", reason);\\n  process.exit(1);\\n});\\n\\nmain().catch((err) => {\\n  console.error(\\\"Fatal:\\\", err);\\n  process.exit(1);\\n});\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":16,\"oldLines\":12,\"newStart\":16,\"newLines\":9,\"lines\":[\" import { encode as tiktokenEncode } from \\\"gpt-tokenizer\\\";\",\" // AB-3: token extraction lives in observerTransformer.ts and telegram-ui.ts.\",\" import {\",\"-  transform as transformReplyTokens,\",\"   type SkillUsageEntry,\",\"   type GoalDoneEntry,\",\" } from \\\"./observerTransformer.js\\\";\",\"-import * as usageStore from \\\"./usageStore.js\\\";\",\"-import { STICKER_MAP } from \\\"./stickerMap.js\\\";\",\" import {\",\"   buildHandoffPrompt,\",\"   parseHandoffArgs,\"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>

Runs after the restart ack so\\n          // if this throws the user still sees the \\\"✅\\\" message.\\n          // restartReason (C3) is propagated into the continuation prompt\\n          // so the post-restart first turn knows why it was restarted.\\n          await maybeAutoResumeGoalAfterRestart(\\n            marker.chatId,\\n            marker.userId,\\n            marker.reason,\\n          ).catch((err) => {\\n            console.error(\\n              `[restart] goal auto-resume for chat ${marker.chatId} failed:`,\\n              err,\\n            );\\n          });\\n        }\\n      } catch (err: any) {\\n        if (err?.code !== \\\"ENOENT\\\") {\\n          console.error(\\\"[restart] post-restart notify failed:\\\", err);\\n        }\\n      }\\n    },\\n  });\\n}\\n\\nconst shutdown = async (signal: string) => {\\n  console.log(`\\\\nReceived ${signal}, shutting down…`);\\n  try {\\n    scheduler.stop();\\n  } catch {\\n    /* noop */\\n  }\\n  try {\\n    await bot.stop();\\n  } catch {\\n    /* noop */\\n  }\\n  try {\\n    await withTimeout(\\n      sessions.shutdown(),\\n      config.memoryExtractTimeoutMs + 30_000,\\n      \\\"sessions.shutdown\\\",\\n    );\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.error(\\\"[shutdown] graceful shutdown failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  try { stopPetApp(); hint the user to type it.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"需要參數，請直接輸入指令。\\\" });\\n      await ctx.reply(`請直接輸入 ${spec.usage} 來執行。`);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const handler = COMMAND_HANDLERS[spec.name];\\n    if (!handler) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"此指令尚未支援按鈕執行。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `執行 ${spec.usage} 中…` });\\n    try {\\n      await handler(ctx);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      await ctx.reply(`執行失敗：${(err as Error).message}`);\\n    }\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"A\\\") {\\n    // ASK callback: data is `A:{question_id}:{key}`. split(\\\":\\\", 2) above\\n    // only gave us the first two fields, so re-split here to get the key.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const questionId = parts[1] || \\\"\\\";\\n    const key = parts.slice(2).join(\\\":\\\"); // tolerate accidental ':' in key (shouldn't happen given ASK_KEY_RE)\\n    if (!questionId || !key) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"無效的選擇。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const msgId = ctx.callbackQuery.message?.message_id;\\n    const entries = msgId !== undefined ? askRegistry.get(msgId) : undefined;\\n    const entry = entries?.find((e) => e.questionId === questionId);\\n    const opt = entry?.options.find((o) => o.key === key);\\n    const label = opt?.label ?? key; retrieveWikiPages(text);\\n      // Per-session dedup: skip pages already injected in a prior turn.\\n      const fresh = hits.filter((h) => !session.injectedWikiSlugs.has(h.slug));\\n      if (fresh.length > 0) {\\n        for (const h of fresh) {\\n          wikiHitSlugs.add(h.slug);\\n          session.injectedWikiSlugs.add(h.slug);\\n        }\\n        promptText = formatWikiBlock(fresh) + promptText;\\n      }\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.warn(\\\"[wiki-retrieval] failed:\\\", err);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // Memory recall: inject semantically relevant topic shard facts.\\n  if (!_skipEnrichment && isMemoryRecallReady() && ctx.from?.id) {\\n    try {\\n      const hits = await recallRelevantFacts(\\n        text, ctx.from.id, session.tailFacts, wikiHitSlugs,\\n      );\\n      if (hits.length > 0) {\\n        promptText = formatRecallBlock(hits) + promptText;\\n      }\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.warn(\\\"[memory-recall] failed:\\\", err);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // Skill routing: hint which skills are most relevant.\\n  if (!_skipEnrichment && isSkillRouterReady()) {\\n    try {\\n      const hits = await routeToSkills(text);\\n      // Per-session dedup: skip skills already injected in a prior turn.\\n      const fresh = hits.filter((h) => !session.injectedSkills.has(h.name));\\n      if (fresh.length > 0) {\\n        for (const h of fresh) {\\n          logHit(\\\"skill\\\", h.name, \\\"skill-routing\\\");\\n          session.injectedSkills.add(h.name);\\n        }\\n        promptText = formatSkillHint(fresh) + promptText;\\n      }\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.warn(\\\"[skill-router] failed:\\\", err);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // Intent classification: suggest /command if message looks like a command intent.\\n  if (!_skipEnrichment && isIntentClassifierReady()) {\\n    try {\\n      const hit = await classifyIntent(text);\\n      if (hit) {\\n        promptText =\\n          `[Intent hint — user message may be requesting: ${hit.usage} (score ${hit.score.toFixed(2)})]\\\\n` +\\n          `If the user is asking you to perform this action, tell them to use ${hit.usage} directly.\\\\n` +\\n          `[End intent hint]\\\\n\\\\n` + promptText;\\n      } else if (config.localLlmIntentFallback && session.activeProvider !== \\\"local\\\" && text.length > 25 && text.length <= 80) {\\n        // Embedding classifier skips long messages — try LLM for 25-80 char range\\n        const t0 = Date.now();\\n        const cmds = COMMAND_SPECS.map(c => ({ name: c.name, desc: c.desc }));\\n        const labels = await classifyIntentLLM(text, cmds);\\n        console.log(`[intent-llm] ${labels.length ? labels[0].intent : \\\"none\\\"} (${Date.now() - t0}ms)`);\\n        if (labels.length > 0) {\\n          const spec = COMMAND_SPECS.find(c => c.name === labels[0].intent);\\n          if (spec) {\\n            promptText =\\n              `[Intent hint — user message may be requesting: ${spec.usage} (LLM confidence ${labels[0].confidence.toFixed(2)})]\\\\n` +\\n              `If the user is asking you to perform this action, tell them to use ${spec.usage} directly.\\\\n` +\\n              `[End intent hint]\\\\n\\\\n` + promptText;\\n          }\\n        }\\n      }\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.warn(\\\"[intent-classifier] failed:\\\", err);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // Prepend specialist routing hint if pre-filter matched\\n  if (specialistHint) {\\n    promptText = specialistHint + promptText;\\n  }\\n\\n  // 5d: User negation reflexion hint — when the user expresses\\n  // dissatisfaction (\\\"不對\\\", \\\"重做\\\", \\\"wrong\\\", etc.), prepend a\\n  // reflection hint so the agent self-corrects instead of user indicated your previous response was incorrect. ` +\\n      `Before answering, briefly reflect: what was wrong in your last response? ` +\\n      `What assumption should you revise? \\\".jpg\\\" :\\n      m.voice ? \\\".ogg\\\" :\\n      m.audio ? \\\".mp3\\\" :\\n      m.video ? \\\".mp4\\\" : \\\"\\\";\\n    origName = `${src.file_unique_id}${ext}`;\\n  }\\n  const safeName = sanitizeName(origName);\\n  const ts = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, \\\"-\\\").slice(0, 19);\\n  const relPath = path.join(\\\"uploads\\\", `${chatId}-${ts}-${safeName}`);\\n  const absPath = path.join(config.sessionCwd, relPath);\\n\\n  let notice: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof ctx.reply>> | null = null;\\n  try {\\n    notice = await ctx.reply(`Downloading ${safeName}…`);\\n    const file = await ctx.api.getFile(src.file_id);\\n    const url = `https://api.telegram.org/file/bot${config.telegramToken}/${file.file_path}`;\\n    await downloadToFile(url, absPath);\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    const msg = `Failed to download: ${(err as Error).message}`;\\n    if (notice) {\\n      try { await ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, notice.message_id, msg); }\\n      catch { await ctx.reply(msg); }\\n    } else {\\n      await ctx.reply(msg);\\n    }\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  const caption = (m.caption ?? \\\"\\\").trim();\\n\\n  const promptText =\\n    `User uploaded a file via Telegram.\\\\n` +\\n    `Path (relative to cwd): ${relPath.replace(/\\\\\\\\/g, \\\"/\\\")}\\\\n` +\\n    `Original name: ${origName}\\\\n` +\\n    (caption ? `User caption: ${caption}\\\\n` : \\\"\\\") +\\n    (DOC_CONVERTIBLE_EXTS.has(path.extname(absPath).toLowerCase())\\n      ? `Hint: This format can be converted to markdown with: py scripts/doc-to-md.py \\\"${absPath}\\\"\\\\n`\\n      : \\\"\\\") +\\n    `Please inspect it and help accordingly.`;\\n\\n  if (notice) {\\n    try {\\n      await ctx.api.editMessageText(\\n        chatId,\\n        notice.message_id,\\n        `Saved → ${relPath.replace(/\\\\\\\\/g, \\\"/\\\")}`\\n      );\\n    } catch { /* ignore */ }\\n  }\\n\\n  session._lastUploadPath = absPath;\\n  await runPrompt(ctx, session, promptText);\\n});\\n\\nbot.catch((err) => {\\n  console.error(\\\"Bot error:\\\", err);\\n});\\n\\nasync function main() {\\n  console.log(`Starting Telegram ↔ Kiro bridge`);\\n  console.log(`  agent: ${config.agent.command} ${config.agent.args.join(\\\" \\\")}`);\\n  console.log(`  cwd:   ${config.sessionCwd}`);\\n  console.log(`  PATH:  ${process.env.PATH ?? \\\"(empty)\\\"}`);\\n  console.log(`  Path:  ${process.env.Path ?? \\\"(empty)\\\"}`);\\n  console.log(`  PATH===Path: ${process.env.PATH === process.env.Path}`);\\n  console.log(\\n    `  auth:  ${\\n      config.allowedUserIds.length\\n        ? `restricted to ${config.allowedUserIds.join(\\\", \\\")}`\\n        : \\\"open to anyone\\\"\\n    }`\\n  );\\n  // Ensure topics.json exists. Seeds built-in defaults on first run so\\n  // users can edit it without rebuilding.\\n  try {\\n    const { created, file } = bootstrapTopicsFile();\\n    console.log(\\n      `  topics: ${file}${created ? \\\" (created from defaults)\\\" : \\\"\\\"} — active source: ${topicRulesSource()}`\\n    );\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[topic-rules] bootstrap failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Initialize embedding-based NotebookLM router (non-blocking on failure).\\n  try {\\n    const routingPath = path.join(detectAgentConfigDir(), \\\"notebooklm-routing.json\\\");\\n    const raw = await readFile(routingPath, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n    const routing = JSON.parse(raw);\\n    if (routing.version === 2) {\\n      await initEmbedRouter(routing);\\n    } else {\\n      console.log(\\\"[embed-router] skipped: routing.json is not v2\\\");\\n    }\\n  } catch (err: any) {\\n    if (err?.code === \\\"ENOENT\\\") {\\n      console.log(\\\"[embed-router] skipped: notebooklm-routing.json not found\\\");\\n    } else {\\n      console.warn(\\\"[embed-router] init failed:\\\", err);\\n    }\\n  }\\n  // Initialize SQLite memory index (derived from facts .md).\\n  try {\\n    initMemoryDb();\\n    const uid = config.allowedUserIds[0] ?? 0;\\n    if (uid) {\\n      const { inserted, deleted } = syncFactsToDb(uid);\\n      console.log(`[memory-db] synced: +${inserted} -${deleted} facts`);\\n    }\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[memory-db] init failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Initialize memory recall (topic-based semantic retrieval).\\n  try {\\n    await initMemoryRecall();\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[memory-recall] init failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Initialize skill router (semantic skill matching).\\n  try {\\n    await initSkillRouter();\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[skill-router] init failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Initialize wiki retrieval (semantic wiki page matching).\\n  try {\\n    await initWikiRetrieval();\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[wiki-retrieval] init failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Initialize index retrieval (PageIndex tree-based document matching).\\n  try {\\n    const { initIndexRetrieval } = await import(\\\"./index-retrieval.js\\\");\\n    await initIndexRetrieval();\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[index-retrieval] init failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Initialize intent classifier (natural language → /command matching).\\n  try {\\n    await initIntentClassifier(COMMAND_SPECS.map((s) => ({ name: s.name, usage: s.usage, desc: s.desc })));\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.warn(\\\"[intent-classifier] init failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Auto-regenerate specialist configs from specialist-domains.json.\\n  try {\\n    const { expandDomains, console.log(`[specialist] domain expansion: updated ${expansions.length} domain(s)`);\\n    }\\n    const { syncAllSpecialists } = await import(\\\"./specialist-create.js\\\");\\n    const synced = console.warn(\\\"[specialist] config load failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  // Auto-start llama.cpp server if configured (non-blocking on failure).\\n  try {\\n    const { autoStartLlamaCpp } = await (if PET_ENABLED=true).\\n  startPetServer();\\n  // Pet mini chat → inject into owner's live session\\n  onPetChat(async (text) => {\\n    const ownerId = config.allowedUserIds[0];\\n    if (!ownerId)      await runPrompt(fakeCtx as any, session, `[from desktop pet] ${text}`);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.error(\\\"[pet-chat] runPrompt failed:\\\", err);\\n      petEmit({ type: \\\"state\\\", state: \\\"error\\\", text: \\\"處理失敗\\\" });\\n    }\\n  });\\n  await bot.start({\\n    onStart: async (me) => {\\n      console.log(`Bot online as @${me.username}`);\\n      // Start status monitoring server.\\n      startStatusServer(config.statusPort);\\n      // Publish the slash-command list so Telegram's Menu button (☰) shows it.\\n      registerBotCommands(bot).catch((err) =>\\n        console.error(\\\"[bot] registerBotCommands failed:\\\", err),\\n      );\\n      // Doctor Pattern: startup health check → notify user.\\n      runHealthCheck().then((results) => {\\n        const report = formatReport(results);\\n        console.log(\\\"[doctor]\\\", report.replace(/\\\\n/g, \\\" | \\\"));\\n        const chatId = config.allowedUserIds[0];\\n        if (chatId) bot.api.sendMessage(chatId, report).catch(() => {});\\n      }).catch((err) => console.error(\\\"[doctor] health check crashed:\\\", err));\\n      // Start bot-to-bot relay poller → commands/relay.ts\\n      initRelayPoller(bot);\\n      // Drain any pending fact-extractions that timed out in previous runs.\\n      // Fire-and-forget so bot startup isn't blocked on slow model calls.\\n      processPendingExtractions().catch((err) =>\\n        console.error(\\\"[memory] processPendingExtractions failed:\\\", err),\\n      );\\n      // Reload scheduled prompts. Any entries whose runAt already passed\\n      // during bridge downtime are skipped (policy: skip, not replay) and\\n      // reported back to their originating chat.\\n      try {\\n        const { upcoming, missed } = await scheduleStore.load();\\n\\n        // Seed default daily /dream schedule on first install\\n        const hasDream = scheduleStore.list().some(\\n          (e) => e.prompt === \\\"/dream\\\" && e.recurrence?.kind === \\\"daily\\\",\\n        );\\n        if (!hasDream && config.allowedUserIds.length > 0) {\\n          const primaryUser = config.allowedUserIds[0];\\n          const now = new Date();\\n          const runAt = new Date(now);\\n          runAt.setHours(4, 0, 0, 0);\\n          if (runAt.getTime() <= now.getTime()) runAt.setDate(runAt.getDate() + 1);\\n          await scheduleStore.add({\\n            chatId: primaryUser,\\n            userId: primaryUser,\\n            runAt: runAt.getTime(),\\n            prompt: \\\"/dream\\\",\\n            recurrence: { kind: \\\"daily\\\", hour: 4, minute: 0, second: 0 },\\n          });\\n          console.log(`[schedule] seeded default: daily 04:00 /dream for user ${primaryUser}`);\\n        }\\n\\n        scheduler.armAll();\\n        console.log(\\n          `[schedule] loaded ${upcoming.length} upcoming, ${missed.length} missed`,\\n        );\\n        const missedByChat = new Map<number, ScheduleEntry[]>();\\n        for (const e of missed) {\\n          const arr = missedByChat.get(e.chatId) ?? [];\\n          arr.push(e);\\n          missedByChat.set(e.chatId, arr);\\n        }\\n        for (const [chatId, entries] of missedByChat) {\\n          const lines = entries.map((e) => {\\n            const preview = e.prompt.length > 60 ? e.prompt.slice(0, 60) + \\\"…\\\" : e.prompt;\\n            return `• ${e.id} — ${new Date(e.runAt).toLocaleString()}\\\\n  ${preview}`;\\n          });\\n          await bot.api\\n            .sendMessage(\\n              chatId,\\n              `⚠️ bridge 重啟期間錯過 ${entries.length} 筆排程，依政策已略過：\\\\n${lines.join(\\\"\\\\n\\\")}`,\\n            )\\n            .catch((err) =>\\n              console.error(`[schedule] missed-notify to ${chatId} failed:`, err),\\n            );\\n        }\\n      } catch (err) {\\n        console.error(\\\"[schedule] load failed:\\\", err);\\n      }\\n      // If we were respawned by /restart, notify the requesting chat and\\n      // — if there's an active /goal on that chat with budget left — auto-\\n      // resume the continuation loop so the user doesn't have to send a\\n      // dummy message to wake it up. Policy:\\n      //   Q1 scope:  pending-only. We only auto-resume the chat that\\n      //              triggered /restart (marker.chatId). SIGINT / crash\\n      //              restarts won't auto-resume; user must poke manually.\\n      //   Q2 budget: keep turns_used as-is. The interrupted turn counts.\\n      //   Q3 trigger: auto-fire immediately after the \\\"✅ Bridge\\n      //              restarted.\\\" message — shared UI with /goal resume +\\n      //              auto-scheduled continuations (\\\"↻ Continuing (N/M)\\\").\\n      try {\\n        const raw = await readFile(RESTART_PENDING_FILE, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n        const marker = JSON.parse(raw) as {\\n          chatId: number;\\n          userId?: number;\\n          savedFilename?: string;\\n          savedCount?: number;\\n          reason?: string;\\n        };\\n        await unlink(RESTART_PENDING_FILE).catch(() => {});\\n        if (typeof marker.chatId === \\\"number\\\") {\\n          let msg = \\\"✅ Bridge restarted.\\\";\\n          if (marker.savedFilename && marker.savedCount) {\\n            msg += `\\\\nSaved ${marker.savedCount} messages → sessions/${marker.savedFilename}`;\\n          }\\n          if (marker.reason) {\\n            msg += `\\\\nReason: ${marker.reason}`;\\n          }\\n          await bot.api.sendMessage(marker.chatId, msg);\\n          // Auto-resume goal continuation. Runs after the restart ack so\\n          // if this throws the user still sees the \\\"✅\\\" message.\\n          // restartReason (C3) is propagated into the continuation prompt\\n          // so the post-restart first turn knows why it was restarted.\\n          await maybeAutoResumeGoalAfterRestart(\\n            marker.chatId,\\n            marker.userId,\\n            marker.reason,\\n          ).catch((err) => {\\n            console.error(\\n              `[restart] goal auto-resume for chat ${marker.chatId} failed:`,\\n              err,\\n            );\\n          });\\n        }\\n      } catch (err: any) {\\n        if (err?.code !== \\\"ENOENT\\\") {\\n          console.error(\\\"[restart] post-restart notify failed:\\\", err);\\n        }\\n      }\\n    },\\n  });\\n}\\n\\nconst shutdown = async (signal: string) => {\\n  console.log(`\\\\nReceived ${signal}, shutting down…`);\\n  try {\\n    scheduler.stop();\\n  } catch {\\n    /* noop */\\n  }\\n  try {\\n    await bot.stop();\\n  } catch {\\n    /* noop */\\n  }\\n  try {\\n    await withTimeout(\\n      sessions.shutdown(),\\n      config.memoryExtractTimeoutMs + 30_000,\\n      \\\"sessions.shutdown\\\",\\n    );\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.error(\\\"[shutdown] graceful shutdown failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  try { stopPetApp(); } catch { /* noop */ }\\n  process.exit(0);\\n};\\n\\nprocess.on(\\\"SIGINT\\\", () => shutdown(\\\"SIGINT\\\"));\\nprocess.on(\\\"SIGTERM\\\", () => shutdown(\\\"SIGTERM\\\"));\\n\\n// Last-resort crash handlers: log and exit non-zero so the outer\\n// start.bat loop (or any supervisor) restarts us.\\nprocess.on(\\\"uncaughtException\\\", (err) => {\\n  console.error(\\\"uncaughtException:\\\", err);\\n  process.exit(1);\\n});\\nprocess.on(\\\"unhandledRejection\\\", (reason) => {\\n  console.error(\\\"unhandledRejection:\\\", reason);\\n  process.exit(1);\\n});\\n\\nmain().catch((err) => {\\n  console.error(\\\"Fatal:\\\", err);\\n  process.exit(1);\\n});\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":49,\"oldLines\":7,\"newStart\":49,\"newLines\":6,\"lines\":[\"   type AskOption, type AskEntry, type ScheduleTokenEntry, type PendingSchedule,\",\"   type ScheduleParsers,\",\" } from \\\"./telegram-ui.js\\\";\",\"-import { markdownToHtml } from \\\"./format-html.js\\\";\",\" import { initCommandDeps } from \\\"./commands/deps.js\\\";\",\" import { handleDream, handleDailyLog, handleArtifactCleanup, handleUtilityReport, handleDocUpdate } from \\\"./commands/dream.js\\\";\",\" import { handleGoal } from \\\"./commands/goal.js\\\";\"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>

     await runPrompt(fakeCtx as any, session, `[from desktop pet] ${text}`);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.error(\\\"[pet-chat] runPrompt failed:\\\", err);\\n      petEmit({ type: \\\"state\\\", state: \\\"error\\\", text: \\\"處理失敗\\\" });\\n    }\\n  });\\n  await bot.start({\\n    onStart: async (me) => {\\n      console.log(`Bot online as @${me.username}`);\\n      // Start status monitoring server.\\n      startStatusServer(config.statusPort);\\n      // Publish the slash-command list so Telegram's Menu button (☰) shows it.\\n      registerBotCommands(bot).catch((err) =>\\n        console.error(\\\"[bot] registerBotCommands failed:\\\", err),\\n      );\\n      // Doctor Pattern: startup health check → notify user.\\n      runHealthCheck().then((results) => {\\n        const report = formatReport(results);\\n        console.log(\\\"[doctor]\\\", report.replace(/\\\\n/g, \\\" | \\\"));\\n        const chatId = config.allowedUserIds[0];\\n        if (chatId) bot.api.sendMessage(chatId, report).catch(() => {});\\n      }).catch((err) => console.error(\\\"[doctor] health check crashed:\\\", err));\\n      // Start bot-to-bot relay poller → commands/relay.ts\\n      initRelayPoller(bot);\\n      // Drain any pending fact-extractions that timed out in previous runs.\\n      // Fire-and-forget so bot startup isn't blocked on slow model calls.\\n      processPendingExtractions().catch((err) =>\\n        console.error(\\\"[memory] processPendingExtractions failed:\\\", err),\\n      );\\n      // Reload scheduled prompts. Any entries whose runAt already passed\\n      // during bridge downtime are skipped (policy: skip, not replay) and\\n      // reported back to their originating chat.\\n      try {\\n        const { upcoming, missed } = await scheduleStore.load();\\n\\n        // Seed default daily /dream schedule on first install\\n        const hasDream = scheduleStore.list().some(\\n          (e) => e.prompt === \\\"/dream\\\" && e.recurrence?.kind === \\\"daily\\\",\\n        );\\n        if (!hasDream && config.allowedUserIds.length > 0) {\\n          const primaryUser = config.allowedUserIds[0];\\n          const now = new Date();\\n          const runAt = new Date(now);\\n          runAt.setHours(4, 0, 0, 0);\\n          if (runAt.getTime() <= now.getTime()) runAt.setDate(runAt.getDate() + 1);\\n          await scheduleStore.add({\\n            chatId: primaryUser,\\n            userId: primaryUser,\\n            runAt: runAt.getTime(),\\n            prompt: \\\"/dream\\\",\\n            recurrence: { kind: \\\"daily\\\", hour: 4, minute: 0, second: 0 },\\n          });\\n          console.log(`[schedule] seeded default: daily 04:00 /dream for user ${primaryUser}`);\\n        }\\n\\n        scheduler.armAll();\\n        console.log(\\n          `[schedule] loaded ${upcoming.length} upcoming, ${missed.length} missed`,\\n        );\\n        const missedByChat = new Map<number, ScheduleEntry[]>();\\n        for (const e of missed) {\\n          const arr = missedByChat.get(e.chatId) ?? [];\\n          arr.push(e);\\n          missedByChat.set(e.chatId, arr);\\n        }\\n        for (const [chatId, entries] of missedByChat) {\\n          const lines = entries.map((e) => {\\n            const preview = e.prompt.length > 60 ? e.prompt.slice(0, 60) + \\\"…\\\" : e.prompt;\\n            return `• ${e.id} — ${new Date(e.runAt).toLocaleString()}\\\\n  ${preview}`;\\n          });\\n          await bot.api\\n            .sendMessage(\\n              chatId,\\n              `⚠️ bridge 重啟期間錯過 ${entries.length} 筆排程，依政策已略過：\\\\n${lines.join(\\\"\\\\n\\\")}`,\\n            )\\n            .catch((err) =>\\n              console.error(`[schedule] missed-notify to ${chatId} failed:`, err),\\n            );\\n        }\\n      } catch (err) {\\n        console.error(\\\"[schedule] load failed:\\\", err);\\n      }\\n      // If we were respawned by /restart, notify the requesting chat and\\n      // — if there's an active /goal on that chat with budget left — auto-\\n      // resume the continuation loop so the user doesn't have to send a\\n      // dummy message to wake it up. Policy:\\n      //   Q1 scope:  pending-only. We only auto-resume the chat that\\n      //              triggered /restart (marker.chatId). SIGINT / crash\\n      //              restarts won't auto-resume; user must poke manually.\\n      //   Q2 budget: keep turns_used as-is. The interrupted turn counts.\\n      //   Q3 trigger: auto-fire immediately after the \\\"✅ Bridge\\n      //              restarted.\\\" message — shared UI with /goal resume +\\n      //              auto-scheduled continuations (\\\"↻ Continuing (N/M)\\\").\\n      try {\\n        const raw = await readFile(RESTART_PENDING_FILE, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n        const marker = JSON.parse(raw) as {\\n          chatId: number;\\n          userId?: number;\\n          savedFilename?: string;\\n          savedCount?: number;\\n          reason?: string;\\n        };\\n        await unlink(RESTART_PENDING_FILE).catch(() => {});\\n        if (typeof marker.chatId === \\\"number\\\") {\\n          let msg = \\\"✅ Bridge restarted.\\\";\\n          if (marker.savedFilename && marker.savedCount) {\\n            msg += `\\\\nSaved ${marker.savedCount} messages → sessions/${marker.savedFilename}`;\\n          }\\n          if (marker.reason) {\\n            msg += `\\\\nReason: ${marker.reason}`;\\n          }\\n          await bot.api.sendMessage(marker.chatId, msg);\\n          // Auto-resume goal continuation. Runs after the restart ack so\\n          // if this throws the user still sees the \\\"✅\\\" message.\\n          // restartReason (C3) is propagated into the continuation prompt\\n          // so the post-restart first turn knows why it was restarted.\\n          await maybeAutoResumeGoalAfterRestart(\\n            marker.chatId,\\n            marker.userId,\\n            marker.reason,\\n          ).catch((err) => {\\n            console.error(\\n              `[restart] goal auto-resume for chat ${marker.chatId} failed:`,\\n              err,\\n            );\\n          });\\n        }\\n      } catch (err: any) {\\n        if (err?.code !== \\\"ENOENT\\\") {\\n          console.error(\\\"[restart] post-restart notify failed:\\\", err);\\n        }\\n      }\\n    },\\n  });\\n}\\n\\nconst shutdown = async (signal: string) => {\\n  console.log(`\\\\nReceived ${signal}, shutting down…`);\\n  try {\\n    scheduler.stop();\\n  } catch {\\n    /* noop */\\n  }\\n  try {\\n    await bot.stop();\\n  } catch {\\n    /* noop */\\n  }\\n  try {\\n    await withTimeout(\\n      sessions.shutdown(),\\n      config.memoryExtractTimeoutMs + 30_000,\\n      \\\"sessions.shutdown\\\",\\n    );\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.error(\\\"[shutdown] graceful shutdown failed:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n  try { stopPetApp(); } catch { /* noop */ }\\n  process.exit(0);\\n};\\n\\nprocess.on(\\\"SIGINT\\\", () => shutdown(\\\"SIGINT\\\"));\\nprocess.on(\\\"SIGTERM\\\", () => shutdown(\\\"SIGTERM\\\"));\\n\\n// Last-resort crash handlers: log and exit non-zero so the outer\\n// start.bat loop (or any supervisor) restarts us.\\nprocess.on(\\\"uncaughtException\\\", (err) => {\\n  console.error(\\\"uncaughtException:\\\", err);\\n  process.exit(1);\\n});\\nprocess.on(\\\"unhandledRejection\\\", (reason) => {\\n  console.error(\\\"unhandledRejection:\\\", reason);\\n  process.exit(1);\\n});\\n\\nmain().catch((err) => {\\n  console.error(\\\"Fatal:\\\", err);\\n  process.exit(1);\\n});\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":67,\"oldLines\":7,\"newStart\":67,\"newLines\":7,\"lines\":[\" } from \\\"./commands/misc.js\\\";\",\" import { formatRelative } from \\\"./utils.js\\\";\",\" import {\",\"-  extractMemoryTokensFromProxy, stripMemoryTokens, saveDelegationContext,\",\"+  saveDelegationContext,\",\"   loadDelegationContext, notifyRelayOwner, buildRelayDelegationPrompt,\",\"   handleSpecialistProxy, buildSpecialistHint, extractRelayTokens,\",\"   extractRelayDone, dispatchRelayHeadless, dispatchRelayVisible,\"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>

turn\\\" from \\\"we're currently\\n * running one\\\" at the type level. */\\ntype ContinuationPlan = ContinuationContext;\\n\\nexport type RunPromptMode =\\n  | { kind: \\\"user\\\" }\\n  | { kind: \\\"continuation\\\"; context: ContinuationContext }\\n  | { kind: \\\"meta\\\"; silent?: boolean }\\n  | { kind: \\\"relay\\\"; replyTo: string };\\n\\n// ─── Sticker auto-selection ──────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nconst EMOTION_REPRS: Record<string, string> = {\\n  hello: \\\"打招呼 你好 嗨 早安 晚安 greeting\\\",\\n  happy: \\\"開心 太好了 成功 完成了 恭喜 great\\\",\\n 0.65;\\nconst STICKER_AUTO_MAX_REPLY_LEN = 150;\\nlet emotionVectors: Map<string, Float32Array> | null = null;\\n\\nexport async function autoSelectSticker(reply: string): Promise<string | null> {\\n  if (reply.length > STICKER_AUTO_MAX_REPLY_LEN || reply.length < 5) return null;\\n  if (!emotionVectors) {\\n    emotionVectors = new Map();\\n    for (const [emotion, repr] of bestScore = score; best = emotion; }\\n  }\\n  return bestScore >= STICKER_AUTO_THRESHOLD ? best : null;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Continuation timer cancelPendingContinuation(chatId: number): void {\\n  const h = pendingContinuations.get(chatId);\\n  if (h) {\\n    clearTimeout(h);\\n    pendingContinuations.delete(chatId);\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n// ─── function initRunPrompt(deps: RunPromptDeps): void {\\n  _deps = deps;\\n}\\n\\nfunction deps(): RunPromptDeps {\\n  if (!_deps) throw new Error(\\\"runPrompt not initialized — call initRunPrompt first\\\");\\n  return _deps;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Auto-wikilink post-processing ───────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n/** After a wiki page is written, scan it and inject [[wikilinks]] for known entities. */\\nfunction applyAutoWikilink(slug: string): void {\\n  const { MEMORY_DIR } = deps();\\n  for (const sub of [\\\"queries\\\", \\\"concepts\\\", \\\"references\\\", \\\"lessons\\\", \\\"tasks\\\"]) {\\n    const filePath = path.join(MEMORY_DIR, \\\"wiki\\\", sub, `${slug}.md`);\\n    if (existsSync(filePath)) {\\n      try {\\n        const content = readFileSync(filePath, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n        const linked = autoWikilink(content);\\n        if (linked !== content) {\\n          writeFileSync(filePath, linked, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n          console.log(`[auto-wikilink] injected links into wiki/${sub}/${slug}.md`);\\n        }\\n      } catch (err) {\\n        console.error(`[auto-wikilink] failed for ${slug}:`, err);\\n      }\\n      return;\\n    }\\n mode.kind === \\\"meta\\\";\\n  const isSilentMeta = mode.kind === \\\"meta\\\" && mode.silent === true;\\n  const relayReplyTo = mode.kind === \\\"relay\\\" ? mode.replyTo : undefined;\\n  const    return;\\n    }\\n    if (isMeta) {\\n      console.log(`[chat ${chatId}] meta prompt queued (session inflight)`);\\n      session._pendingMetaQueue.push({ ctx: ctx as unknown as any, prompt: text, opts: mode as any });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.reply(\\n      \\\"⏳ 上一個回合還在進行中。請等它結束，或先用 /cancel 取消。\\\",\\n    );\\n    return;\\n  }\\n  session.inflight = true;\\n  sessions.resetTurn(session);\\n  petState(\\\"thinking\\\");\\n\\n  let continuationPlan: ContinuationPlan | null = null;\\n  let continueTokenFired = false;\\n  let pendingRestartReason: string | null = null;\\n\\n  if (!continuationContext) {\\n    session.history.push({ role: \\\"user\\\", text, timestamp: Date.now() });\\n  }\\n  session.charsIn += text.length;\\n\\n  let promptText = text;\\n  if (!session.preambleInjected && session.memoryPreamble) {\\n    promptText = session.memoryPreamble + text;\\n    session.preambleInjected = true;\\n  }\\n\\n  const replyToId = `…[+${snapshot.length - 800} chars]`\\n          : snapshot;\\n        console.warn(\\n          `[rate-limit] chat ${chatId} streaming paused; current buffer (${snapshot.length} chars):\\\\n---\\\\n${preview || \\\"(empty)\\\"}\\\\n---`\\n        );\\n      }\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const { content, parseMode } = renderReply(session, false, scheduleParsers);\\n    if (content === lastRendered) return;\\n    lastRendered = content;\\n    lastEditAt = Date.now();\\n    try {\\n      await ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, placeholder.message_id, content,\\n        parseMode ? { parse_mode: parseMode } : {});\\n    } catch {\\n      // parse error or identical content — retry without parse_mode (strip HTML tags)\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.api.editMessageText(chatId, placeholder.message_id,\\n          content.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, \\\"\\\"));\\n      } catch { /* identical or rate-limited; ignore */ }\\n    }\\n  };\\n\\n  const unregisterRecovery = isRelay || isSilentMeta ? () => {} : onRateLimitRecovery(() => {\\n    if (turnFinalized) {\\n      console.log(\\n        `[rate-limit] chat ${chatId} recovery callback suppressed — turn already finalized`\\n      );\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    throttledSnapshotLogged = false;\\n    console.log(\\n      `[rate-limit] chat ${chatId} resuming edits — pushing latest buffer (${(session.buffer || \\\"\\\").length} chars)`\\n    );\\n    lastRendered = \\\"\\\";\\n    return editNow();\\n  });\\n\\n  session.onUpdate = isRelay\\n    ? undefined\\n    : () => {\\n        const elapsed = Date.now() - lastEditAt;\\n        if (elapsed >= STREAM_EDIT_INTERVAL_MS) {\\n          editNow();\\n        } else if (!editTimer) {\\n          editTimer = setTimeout(() => {\\n            editTimer = null;\\n            editNow();\\n Extract relay tokens before ab7 (it doesn't know them).\\n    const relayTokens: { target: string; text: string }[] = [];\\n    const relayFileTokens: { target: string; path: string }[] = [];\\n /<<PARALLEL_DELEGATE:\\\\s*([^|>\\\\r\\\\n]+?)\\\\s*\\\\|\\\\s*([^|>\\\\r\\\\n]+?)\\\\s*\\\\|\\\\s*([^>\\\\r\\\\n]+?)\\\\s*>>/g;\\n    {\\n      const { masked, restore } = maskCodeRegions(session.buffer);\\n      const stripped = masked\\n        .replace(RELAY_DELEGATE_RE, (_m, target: string, body: string) => {\\n          let p: DelegatePayload;\\n          try {\\n            p = JSON.parse(body) as DelegatePayload;\\n            if (!p.id && (p as any).correlationId) p.id = (p as any).correlationId;\\n          } catch {\\n            p = { id: from \\\"./types.js\\\";\\n\\n// ─── Types ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n/** Same shape as ContinuationContext; re-aliased so the runPrompt body\\n * can distinguish \\\"plan scheduled for next turn\\\" from \\\"we're currently\\n * running one\\\" at the type level. */\\ntype ContinuationPlan = ContinuationContext;\\n\\nexport type RunPromptMode =\\n  | { kind: \\\"user\\\" }\\n  | { kind: \\\"continuation\\\"; context: ContinuationContext }\\n  | { kind: \\\"meta\\\"; silent?: boolean }\\n  | { kind: \\\"relay\\\"; replyTo: string };\\n\\n// ─── Sticker auto-selection ──────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nconst EMOTION_REPRS: Record<string, string> = {\\n  hello: \\\"打招呼 你好 嗨 早安 晚安 greeting\\\",\\n  happy: \\\"開心 太好了 成功 完成了 恭喜 great\\\",\\n  thanks: \\\"謝謝 感謝 thank you 不客氣\\\",\\n  sorry: \\\"抱歉 對不起 不好意思 sorry\\\",\\n  agree: \\\"同意 沒問題 好的 了解 ok sure\\\",\\n  good: \\\"做得好 讚 很棒 nice well done\\\",\\n  clap: \\\"恭喜 太厲害了 完美 bravo\\\",\\n  love: \\\"喜歡 愛 太棒了 超讚\\\",\\n  sad: \\\"可惜 遺憾 不幸 unfortunately\\\",\\n  shock: \\\"驚訝 天啊 沒想到 wow unexpected\\\",\\n  ok: \\\"收到 了解 知道了 acknowledged\\\",\\n};\\nconst STICKER_AUTO_THRESHOLD = 0.65;\\nconst STICKER_AUTO_MAX_REPLY_LEN = 150;\\nlet emotionVectors: Map<string, Float32Array> | null = null;\\n\\nexport async function autoSelectSticker(reply: string): Promise<string | null> {\\n  if (reply.length > STICKER_AUTO_MAX_REPLY_LEN || reply.length < 5) return null;\\n  if (!emotionVectors) {\\n    emotionVectors = new Map();\\n    for (const [emotion, repr] of Object.entries(EMOTION_REPRS)) {\\n      const vec = await embedText(repr);\\n      if (vec) emotionVectors.set(emotion, vec);\\n    }\\n  }\\n  const queryVec = await embedText(reply);\\n  if (!queryVec) return null;\\n  let best = \\\"\\\";\\n  let bestScore = 0;\\n  for (const [emotion, vec] of emotionVectors) {\\n    const score = cosineSim(queryVec, vec);\\n    if (score > bestScore) { bestScore = score; best = emotion; }\\n  }\\n  return bestScore >= STICKER_AUTO_THRESHOLD ? best : null;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Continuation timer ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nconst GOAL_CONTINUATION_DELAY_MS = 500;\\nconst pendingContinuations = new Map<number, NodeJS.Timeout>();\\n\\nexport function cancelPendingContinuation(chatId: number): void {\\n  const h = pendingContinuations.get(chatId);\\n  if (h) {\\n    clearTimeout(h);\\n    pendingContinuations.delete(chatId);\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n// ─── onRateLimitRecovery: (fn: () => void | Promise<void>) => () => void;\\n  queuePendingMessage: (chatId: number, text: string) => void;\\n  handleRestart: (ctx: Context, opts?: { reason?: string }) => function initRunPrompt(deps: RunPromptDeps): void {\\n  _deps = deps;\\n}\\n\\nfunction deps(): RunPromptDeps {\\n  if (!_deps) throw new Error(\\\"runPrompt not initialized — call initRunPrompt first\\\");\\n  return _deps;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Auto-wikilink post-processing ───────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n/** After a wiki page is written, scan it and inject [[wikilinks]] for known entities. */\\nfunction applyAutoWikilink(slug: string): void {\\n  const { MEMORY_DIR } = deps();\\n  for (const sub of [\\\"queries\\\", \\\"concepts\\\", \\\"references\\\", \\\"lessons\\\", \\\"tasks\\\"]) {\\n    const filePath = path.join(MEMORY_DIR, \\\"wiki\\\", sub, `${slug}.md`);\\n    if (existsSync(filePath)) {\\n      try {\\n        const content = readFileSync(filePath, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n        const linked = autoWikilink(content);\\n        if (linked !== content) {\\n          writeFileSync(filePath, linked, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n          console.log(`[auto-wikilink] message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user requested consolidating three duplicate specialist proxy logic implementations into a single shared function. The duplicates were:
   - `src/commands/relay.ts` containing `handleSpecialistProxy()` function that was never called (dead code)
   - `src/index.ts` containing inline proxy logic for continuation mode (when user sends messages during active proxy)
   - `src/run-prompt.ts` containing inline proxy logic for initial activation (when agent emits <<SPECIALIST_PROXY>> token)
   
   Goal: Unify the logic into the `relay.ts` function and have both `index.ts` and `run-prompt.ts` call it, removing duplicate code while preserving all functionality. User specified to ensure TypeScript compilation passes and not to modify non-proxy related logic.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Specialist proxy mode: Telegram bot feature that routes user messages to specialized AI agents
   - Dual-mode function design: Single function supporting both initial activation and continuation modes
   - TypeScript function overloading vs. union types in parameter passing
   - Dependency injection pattern (passing parsers and utilities as parameters)
   - Fire-and-forget pattern for async operations that shouldn't block main flow
   - Markdown to HTML rendering with plain-text fallback for Telegram message parsing
   - Streaming message updates with throttling to respect Telegram rate limits
   - Token extraction and transformation for special commands (files, stickers, skills, ASK prompts)

3. Files and Code Sections:
   - **src/commands/relay.ts**
     - Core file containing the consolidated specialist proxy handler
     - Modified ProxyHandlerOpts interface (lines 81-99):
       ```typescript
       export interface ProxyHandlerOpts {
         chatId: number;
         text: string;
         ctx: Context;
         streamEditIntervalMs: number;
         rateLimitedUntil: () => number;  // Changed from number to function
         parseDuration: (s: string) => number | null;
         parseAbsoluteTime: (s: string) => Date | null;
         parseRecurrence: (s: string) => any;
         computeNextRunAt: (r: any, after: number) => number | null;  // Made after required
         estimateTokens: (chars: number) => number;  // Narrowed from string | number
         startTarget?: string;  // Added for dual-mode support
       }
       ```
     - Enhanced handleSpecialistProxy function with dual-mode support and improved error handling
   
   - **src/index.ts**
     - Replaced 158-line inline proxy block (lines 792-949) with 12-line function call:
       ```typescript
       if (isProxyActive(chatId)) {
         await handleSpecialistProxy({
           chatId,
           text,
           ctx,
           streamEditIntervalMs: STREAM_EDIT_INTERVAL_MS,
           rateLimitedUntil,
           parseDuration,
           parseAbsoluteTime,
           parseRecurrence,
           computeNextRunAt,
           estimateTokens,
         });
         return;
       }
       ```
     - Net reduction of 141 lines
   
   - **src/run-prompt.ts**
     - Added handleSpecialistProxy import from ./commands/relay.js
     - Replaced 86-line inline proxy block (lines 1007-1092) with 19-line fire-and-forget call:
       ```typescript
       if (!isMeta && ab7.specialistProxy && isLocalSpecialist(ab7.specialistProxy.name)) {
         const { name, message } = ab7.specialistProxy;
         handleSpecialistProxy({
           chatId,
           text: message,
           ctx,
           streamEditIntervalMs: STREAM_EDIT_INTERVAL_MS,
           rateLimitedUntil,
           parseDuration,
           parseAbsoluteTime,
           parseRecurrence,
           computeNextRunAt,
           estimateTokens,
           startTarget: name,  // Triggers initial activation mode
         }).catch((err) =>
           console.error(`[chat ${chatId}] specialist proxy initial activation failed:`, err));
       }
       ```
     - Net reduction of 67 lines

   - **src/observerTransformer.ts**
     - Referenced ScheduleParsers interface (lines 191-196) to verify correct function signatures
     - Confirmed computeNextRunAt requires non-optional `after` parameter

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **TypeScript compilation errors (4 total)**:
     - Error: `computeNextRunAt` signature mismatch in index.ts (line 803) and run-prompt.ts (line 1022)
       - Interface had `(r: any, after?: number)` with optional parameter
       - Actual function signature is `(rec: Recurrence, after: number)` with required parameter
       - Fix: Changed ProxyHandlerOpts to `computeNextRunAt: (r: any, after: number) => number | null`
     
     - Error: `estimateTokens` signature mismatch in index.ts (line 804) and run-prompt.ts (line 1023)
       - Interface had `(x: string | number) => number` union type
       - Actual function has overloaded signatures `(text: string)` and `(chars: number)`
       - When passed as parameter, TypeScript requires single specific signature
       - Both call sites only pass numeric values (character counts)
       - Fix: Changed ProxyHandlerOpts to `estimateTokens: (chars: number) => number`
     
     - Verification: Ran `npx tsc --noEmit` after fixes - compilation passed with zero errors

5. Problem Solving:
   - **Challenge**: Three implementations had different feature sets and calling patterns
     - Solution: Designed dual-mode function with optional `startTarget` parameter to distinguish initial activation from continuation
   
   - **Challenge**: Function signature mismatches between interface and actual implementations
     - Solution: Analyzed ScheduleParsers interface and actual usage patterns, updated ProxyHandlerOpts to match reality
   
   - **Challenge**: rateLimitedUntil needed fresh checks during streaming but was passed as static number
     - Solution: Changed parameter type from `number` to `() => number` function accessor
   
   - **Challenge**: Error handling needed different behavior for initial activation vs continuation
     - Solution: Added conditional cleanup - initial activation errors call `endProxy()` to prevent stuck state, continuation errors keep proxy active for retry
   
   - **Result**: Successfully consolidated 240+ lines of duplicate code into single maintainable function while preserving all functionality and achieving type safety

6. All user messages:
   - Initial request: "接下來請把三份重複的 specialist proxy 邏輯合併成一份。目前狀況：- `src/commands/relay.ts` 有 `handleSpecialistProxy()` 函式（但沒被呼叫）- `src/index.ts` 有 inline 版的 proxy 邏輯（實際在用的）- `src/run-prompt.ts` 也有 inline 版的 proxy 邏輯。請把邏輯統一放在 `relay.ts` 的 `handleSpecialistProxy()` 裡（或者如果更適合的話放在新的共用函式），然後讓 `index.ts` 和 `run-prompt.ts` 都呼叫這個共用函式，移除重複的 inline 程式碼。注意：- 三份邏輯可能有細微差異（觸發方式、context 取得方式等），合併時要保留各自需要的功能- 確保函式簽名能同時滿足所有呼叫點的需求- 改完跑 `npx tsc --noEmit` 確認編譯通過- 不要動到非 proxy 相關的邏輯"

7. Pending Tasks:
   - None - the consolidation task was completed successfully

8. Current Work:
   The consolidation task was completed and verified. The final verification steps confirmed:
   - TypeScript compilation passes cleanly with `npx tsc --noEmit` producing no errors
   - Symbol usage counts show successful deduplication (most proxy symbols used exactly once per file, indicating they're called within handleSpecialistProxy rather than duplicated)
   - Total code reduction exceeded 240 lines (158 from index.ts, 86 from run-prompt.ts)
   - All three duplicate specialist proxy implementations successfully unified into single handleSpecialistProxy function in relay.ts
   - Both index.ts (continuation mode) and run-prompt.ts (initial activation mode) now call the shared function
   - Function supports dual modes via optional `startTarget` parameter
   - Type safety maintained with corrected ProxyHandlerOpts interface signatures

9. Optional Next Step:
   No next step - the task is complete. All duplicate specialist proxy logic has been successfully consolidated into a single shared function, TypeScript compilation passes cleanly, and verification confirms the refactoring achieved its goals.

If you need specific details from before compaction (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: C:\Users\jiunchiwang\.claude\projects\C--Users-jiunchiwang--claude-mem-observer-sessions\6f8e0a69-6a15-4d4e-b545-99f88d9443f0.jsonl

Set by\\n// handleRestart right before sessions.shutdown(); cleared after exit anyway.\\nlet restartPendingChatId: number | undefined;\\n\\n// Best-effort: pipe fetch response body into a file.\\nasync function downloadToFile(url: string, destPath: string): Promise<void> {\\n  const res = await fetch(url);\\n  if (!res.ok || !res.body) {\\n    throw new Error(`download failed: ${res.status} ${res.statusText}`);\\n  }\\n  await mkdir(path.dirname(destPath), { recursive: true });\\n  // Node 18+: Readable.fromWeb for WHATWG stream → Node stream.\\n  const { Readable } = await import(\\\"node:stream\\\");\\n  const nodeStream = Readable.fromWeb(res.body as any);\\n  await pipeline(nodeStream, createWriteStream(destPath));\\n}\\n\\nfunction sanitizeName(name: string): string {\\n  return name.replace(/[\\\\\\\\/:*?\\\"<>|\\\\x00-\\\\x1f]/g, \\\"_\\\").slice(0, 120) || \\\"file\\\";\\n}\\n\\nconst DOC_CONVERTIBLE_EXTS = new Set([\\\".pdf\\\", \\\".docx\\\", \\\".pptx\\\", \\\".xlsx\\\", \\\".xls\\\", \\\".html\\\", \\\".htm\\\"]);\\n\\n\\n// ─── Pending /schedule wizard state ────────────────────────────────────────\\nconst PENDING_SCHEDULE_TTL_MS = 5 * 60 * 1000;\\n\\n// ─── 群組模式：防止 bot 互相無限乒乓 ─────────────────────────────────────\\nconst GROUP_MAX_BOT_TURNS = Number(process.env.GROUP_MAX_BOT_TURNS ?? \\\"5\\\");\\nconst groupTurnCounters = new Map<string, number>();\\n\\n// Relay idle-loop prevention: managed by commands/relay.ts (getRelayLoopGuard)\\n\\n// ─── AB-7b goal continuation timer map ────────────────────────────────────\\n// Per-chat setTimeout handle; set when a goal continuation is scheduled,\\n// cleared (a) when the continuation fires or (b) when a real user message\\n// arrives before it fires (user preempt). Used to render\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// Command handlers (reusable)\\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n// Each handleX(ctx) contains the full body for one command, so it can be\\n// invoked both from bot.command() (slash command) and from the inline-button\\n// callback_query dispatcher below. A handler that depends on ctx.match (an\\n// argument) must gracefully handle the case where ctx.match is undefined —\\n// that's what happens when triggered from a button.\\n\\nbot.command(\\\"help\\\", handleHelp);\\nbot.command(\\\"menu\\\", handleMenu);\\nbot.command(\\\"hide\\\", handleHide);\\n\\n// Handle taps on the inline help keyboard.\\n//   help:<name>   → show that command's description (or return to menu)\\n//   run:<name>    → execute the command (dispatched through COMMAND_HANDLERS)\\nbot.on(\\\"callback_query:data\\\", async (ctx) => {\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) {\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未授權。\\\" });\\n    return;\\n  }\\n  const data = ctx.callbackQuery.data;\\n  const [kind, name] = data.split(\\\":\\\", 2);\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"help\\\") {\\n    if (name === \\\"menu\\\") {\\n      await ctx.editMessageText(HELP_INTRO, {\\n        parse_mode: \\\"Markdown\\\",\\n        reply_markup: buildHelpMenuKeyboard(),\\n      });\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery();\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const spec = COMMAND_SPECS.find((s) => s.name === name);\\n    if (!spec) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的指令。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.editMessageText(renderCommandDetail(spec), {\\n      parse_mode: \\\"Markdown\\\",\\n      reply_markup: buildCommandDetailKeyboard(spec),\\n    });\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery();\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"run\\\") {\\n    const spec = COMMAND_SPECS.find((s) => s.name === name);\\n    if (!spec) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的指令。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (spec.takesArg) {\\n      // Commands that strictly require an argument (e.g. /sendfile <path>)\\n      // can't be run from a button; hint the user to type it.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"需要參數，請直接輸入指令。\\\" });\\n      await ctx.reply(`請直接輸入 ${spec.usage} 來執行。`);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const handler = COMMAND_HANDLERS[spec.name];\\n    if (!handler) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"此指令尚未支援按鈕執行。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `執行 ${spec.usage} 中…` });\\n    try {\\n      await handler(ctx);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      await ctx.reply(`執行失敗：${(err as Error).message}`);\\n    }\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"A\\\") {\\n    // ASK callback: data is `A:{question_id}:{key}`. split(\\\":\\\", 2) above\\n    // only gave us the first two fields, so re-split here to get the key.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const questionId = parts[1] || \\\"\\\";\\n    const key = parts.slice(2).join(\\\":\\\"); // tolerate accidental ':' in key (shouldn't happen given ASK_KEY_RE)\\n    if (!questionId || !key) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"無效的選擇。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const msgId = ctx.callbackQuery.message?.message_id;\\n    const entries = msgId !== undefined ? askRegistry.get(msgId) : undefined;\\n    const entry = entries?.find((e) => e.questionId === questionId);\\n    const opt = entry?.options.find((o) => o.key === key);\\n    const label = opt?.label ?? key; Session is looked up the same\\n    // way the message handler does — ctx.chat is present on callback_query.\\n    const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n    if (chatId === undefined) return;\\n\\n    // ─── /schedule wizard hooks ───────────────────────────────────────────\\n    // The schedule wizard uses ASK but does NOT want the choice forwarded to\\n    // the agent: selections drive bridge-local state transitions instead.\\n    if (questionId === \\\"sched_kind\\\") {\\n      await handleSchedKindChoice(ctx, chatId, key);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (questionId.startsWith(\\\"sched_t_\\\")) {\\n      await handleSchedTimeChoice(ctx, chatId, questionId, key);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    let session: ChatSession;\\n    try {\\n      session = await sessions.get(chatId, ctx.from?.id);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      await ctx.reply(`Failed to start Kiro agent: ${(err as Error).message}`);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await runPrompt(ctx, session, `[ASK:${questionId}] ${key}`);\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"specialist\\\") {\\n    if (!name || !isLocalSpecialist(name)) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"分身不存在。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const chatId = ctx.chat!.id;\\n    startProxy(chatId, name);\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `進入 ${name}` });\\n    await ctx.editMessageText(`🤖 已進入 *${name}* proxy 模式。\\\\n打 /back 退出。`, { parse_mode: \\\"Markdown\\\" });\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"sched\\\") {\\n    // Schedule management buttons. Two ops today:\\n    //   - `sched:rm:<id>` — delete a single schedule, re-render the list.\\n    //   - `sched:cancel`  — no-op escape hatch; just strips the inline\\n    //                       keyboard from the current message so a user\\n    //                       can dismiss all the 🗑 buttons without risking\\n    //                       a fat-finger tap.\\n    // Future subcommands (e.g. \\\"run\\\") can share this branch.\\n    //\\n    // Policy:\\n    //   - Silent toast on success/failure via answerCallbackQuery.\\n    //   - For `rm`, re-render the whole list by editing the original\\n    //     message so the removed row disappears; if the list is now\\n    //     empty, strip the keyboard and change the text to \\\"目前沒有排程。\\\".\\n    //   - For `cancel`, only edit reply_markup (keep the text) so the\\n    //     user still sees what schedules exist — they just can't tap any.\\n    //   - Permission: bridge is 1-on-1 today, but be defensive — reject\\n    //     `rm` when entry.userId !== ctx.from?.id. `cancel` skips the\\n    //     check because it's non-destructive.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const op = parts[1];\\n    const id = parts.slice(2).join(\\\":\\\"); // tolerate ':' in id (shouldn't happen; uuid slice)\\n    if (op === \\\"cancel\\\") {\\n      // Dismiss-keyboard escape hatch. No schedule state changes.\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.editMessageReplyMarkup({ reply_markup: undefined });\\n      } catch (err) {\\n        // \\\"message is not modified\\\" is fine — keyboard was already gone.\\n        console.warn(\\n          `[sched] cancel clear-keyboard failed:`,\\n          (err as Error).message,\\n        );\\n      }\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"已取消,未刪除任何排程。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (op !== \\\"rm\\\" || !id) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的操作。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const entry = scheduleStore.get(id);\\n    if (!entry) {\\n      // Already gone — stale button (user double-tapped, or fired since the\\n      // list was rendered). Tell them, then try to redraw the list so the\\n      // phantom row disappears.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"排程已不存在。\\\" });\\n      const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n      if (chatId !== undefined) {\\n        const { text, keyboard } = renderScheduleList(chatId);\\n        try {\\n          await ctx.editMessageText(text, {\\n            reply_markup: keyboard ?? { inline_keyboard: [] },\\n          });\\n        } catch (err) {\\n          // editMessageText throws \\\"message is not modified\\\" if nothing\\n          // changed — that's fine, nothing to do.\\n          console.warn(\\n            `[sched] redraw after stale rm failed:`,\\n            (err as Error).message,\\n          );\\n        }\\n      }\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (ctx.from?.id !== undefined && entry.userId !== ctx.from.id) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"這不是你的排程。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n    if (chatId !== undefined && entry.chatId !== chatId) {\\n      // Button from another chat somehow reached here — refuse.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"排程不屬於這個聊天室。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    scheduler.disarm(id);\\n    await scheduleStore.remove(id);\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `已移除 ${id}。` });\\n\\n    // Redraw the list in place so the user sees the new state without\\n    // scrolling back to re-run /schedule list.\\n    if (chatId !== undefined) {\\n      const { text, keyboard } = renderScheduleList(chatId);\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.editMessageText(text, {\\n          reply_markup: keyboard ??
