A handler that depends on ctx.match (an\\n// argument) must gracefully handle the case where ctx.match is undefined —\\n// that's what happens when triggered from a button.\\n\\nbot.command(\\\"help\\\", handleHelp);\\nbot.command(\\\"menu\\\", handleMenu);\\nbot.command(\\\"hide\\\", handleHide);\\n\\n// Handle taps on the inline help keyboard.\\n//   help:<name>   → show that command's description (or return to menu)\\n//   run:<name>    → execute the command (dispatched through COMMAND_HANDLERS)\\nbot.on(\\\"callback_query:data\\\", async (ctx) => {\\n  if (!isAllowed(ctx)) {\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未授權。\\\" });\\n    return;\\n  }\\n  const data = ctx.callbackQuery.data;\\n  const [kind, name] = data.split(\\\":\\\", 2);\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"help\\\") {\\n    if (name === \\\"menu\\\") {\\n      await ctx.editMessageText(HELP_INTRO, {\\n        parse_mode: \\\"Markdown\\\",\\n        reply_markup: buildHelpMenuKeyboard(),\\n      });\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery();\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const spec = COMMAND_SPECS.find((s) => s.name === name);\\n    if (!spec) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的指令。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.editMessageText(renderCommandDetail(spec), {\\n      parse_mode: \\\"Markdown\\\",\\n      reply_markup: buildCommandDetailKeyboard(spec),\\n    });\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery();\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"run\\\") {\\n    const spec = COMMAND_SPECS.find((s) => s.name === name);\\n    if (!spec) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的指令。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (spec.takesArg) {\\n      // Commands that strictly require an argument (e.g. /sendfile <path>)\\n      // can't be run from a button; hint the user to type it.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"需要參數，請直接輸入指令。\\\" });\\n      await ctx.reply(`請直接輸入 ${spec.usage} 來執行。`);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const handler = COMMAND_HANDLERS[spec.name];\\n    if (!handler) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"此指令尚未支援按鈕執行。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `執行 ${spec.usage} 中…` });\\n    try {\\n      await handler(ctx);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      await ctx.reply(`執行失敗：${(err as Error).message}`);\\n    }\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"A\\\") {\\n    // ASK callback: data is `A:{question_id}:{key}`. split(\\\":\\\", 2) above\\n    // only gave us the first two fields, so re-split here to get the key.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const questionId = parts[1] || \\\"\\\";\\n    const key = parts.slice(2).join(\\\":\\\"); // tolerate accidental ':' in key (shouldn't happen given ASK_KEY_RE)\\n    if (!questionId || !key) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"無效的選擇。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const msgId = ctx.callbackQuery.message?.message_id;\\n    const entries = msgId !== undefined ? askRegistry.get(msgId) : undefined;\\n    const entry = entries?.find((e) => e.questionId === questionId);\\n    const opt = entry?.options.find((o) => o.key === key);\\n    const label = opt?.label ?? key; // fallback to key if registry lost (e.g. after restart)\\n\\n    // Remove all inline keyboards from the message to prevent re-tapping any\\n    // button in this turn (simplification — see spec §6). Append a \\\"→ 你\\n    // 選擇了：X\\\" line so the transcript shows the selection.\\n    const originalText = ctx.callbackQuery.message?.text ?? \\\"\\\";\\n    const newText = originalText\\n      ? `${originalText}\\\\n\\\\n→ 你選擇了：${label}`\\n      : `→ 你選擇了：${label}`;\\n    try {\\n      await ctx.editMessageText(newText);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.warn(`[ASK] editMessageText failed, keyboard may remain:`, (err as Error).message);\\n    }\\n    if (msgId !== undefined) askRegistry.delete(msgId);\\n\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `已選擇：${label}` });\\n\\n    // Inject the choice as a new user turn. Session is looked up the same\\n    // way the message handler does — ctx.chat is present on callback_query.\\n    const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n    if (chatId === undefined) return;\\n\\n    // ─── /schedule wizard hooks ───────────────────────────────────────────\\n    // The schedule wizard uses ASK but does NOT want the choice forwarded to\\n    // the agent: selections drive bridge-local state transitions instead.\\n    if (questionId === \\\"sched_kind\\\") {\\n      await handleSchedKindChoice(ctx, chatId, key);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (questionId.startsWith(\\\"sched_t_\\\")) {\\n      await handleSchedTimeChoice(ctx, chatId, questionId, key);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    let session: ChatSession;\\n    try {\\n      session = await sessions.get(chatId, ctx.from?.id);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      await ctx.reply(`Failed to start Kiro agent: ${(err as Error).message}`);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await runPrompt(ctx, session, `[ASK:${questionId}] ${key}`);\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"specialist\\\") {\\n    if (!name || !isLocalSpecialist(name)) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"分身不存在。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const chatId = ctx.chat!.id;\\n    startProxy(chatId, name);\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `進入 ${name}` });\\n    await ctx.editMessageText(`🤖 已進入 *${name}* proxy 模式。\\\\n打 /back 退出。`, { parse_mode: \\\"Markdown\\\" });\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"sched\\\") {\\n    // Schedule management buttons. Two ops today:\\n    //   - `sched:rm:<id>` — delete a single schedule, re-render the list.\\n    //   - `sched:cancel`  — no-op escape hatch; just strips the inline\\n    //                       keyboard from the current message so a user\\n    //                       can dismiss all the 🗑 buttons without risking\\n    //                       a fat-finger tap.\\n    // Future subcommands (e.g. \\\"run\\\") can share this branch.\\n    //\\n    // Policy:\\n    //   - Silent toast on success/failure via answerCallbackQuery.\\n    //   - For `rm`, re-render the whole list by editing the original\\n    //     message so the removed row disappears; if the list is now\\n    //     empty, strip the keyboard and change the text to \\\"目前沒有排程。\\\".\\n    //   - For `cancel`, only edit reply_markup (keep the text) so the\\n    //     user still sees what schedules exist — they just can't tap any.\\n    //   - Permission: bridge is 1-on-1 today, but be defensive — reject\\n    //     `rm` when entry.userId !== ctx.from?.id. `cancel` skips the\\n    //     check because it's non-destructive.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const op = parts[1];\\n    const id = parts.slice(2).join(\\\":\\\"); // tolerate ':' in id (shouldn't happen; uuid slice)\\n    if (op === \\\"cancel\\\") {\\n      // Dismiss-keyboard escape hatch. No permission check: the button only\\n      // strips reply_markup from the message the user is already looking at,\\n      // so at worst a different user in a (hypothetical) group chat hides\\n      // the keyboard from themselves. No schedule state changes.\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.editMessageReplyMarkup({ reply_markup: undefined });\\n      } catch (err) {\\n        // \\\"message is not modified\\\" is fine — keyboard was already gone.\\n        console.warn(\\n          `[sched] cancel clear-keyboard failed:`,\\n          (err as Error).message,\\n        );\\n      }\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"已取消,未刪除任何排程。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (op !== \\\"rm\\\" || !id) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"未知的操作。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const entry = scheduleStore.get(id);\\n    if (!entry) {\\n      // Already gone — stale button (user double-tapped, or fired since the\\n      // list was rendered). Tell them, then try to redraw the list so the\\n      // phantom row disappears.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"排程已不存在。\\\" });\\n      const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n      if (chatId !== undefined) {\\n        const { text, keyboard } = renderScheduleList(chatId);\\n        try {\\n          await ctx.editMessageText(text, {\\n            reply_markup: keyboard ?? { inline_keyboard: [] },\\n          });\\n        } catch (err) {\\n          // editMessageText throws \\\"message is not modified\\\" if nothing\\n          // changed — that's fine, nothing to do.\\n          console.warn(\\n            `[sched] redraw after stale rm failed:`,\\n            (err as Error).message,\\n          );\\n        }\\n      }\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (ctx.from?.id !== undefined && entry.userId !== ctx.from.id) {\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"這不是你的排程。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n    if (chatId !== undefined && entry.chatId !== chatId) {\\n      // Button from another chat somehow reached here — refuse.\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"排程不屬於這個聊天室。\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    scheduler.disarm(id);\\n    await scheduleStore.remove(id);\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: `已移除 ${id}。` });\\n\\n    // Redraw the list in place so the user sees the new state without\\n    // scrolling back to re-run /schedule list.\\n    if (chatId !== undefined) {\\n      const { text, keyboard } = renderScheduleList(chatId);\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.editMessageText(text, {\\n          reply_markup: keyboard ?? { inline_keyboard: [] },\\n        });\\n      } catch (err) {\\n        console.warn(\\n          `[sched] redraw after rm failed:`,\\n          (err as Error).message,\\n        );\\n      }\\n    }\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  if (kind === \\\"SP\\\") {\\n    // SKILL_PROPOSE callback: data is `SP:{name}:{yes|no}`.\\n    const parts = data.split(\\\":\\\");\\n    const skillName = parts[1] || \\\"\\\";\\n    const choice = parts[2] || \\\"\\\";\\n    const originalText = ctx.callbackQuery.message?.text ?? \\\"\\\";\\n    if (choice === \\\"no\\\") {\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.editMessageText(`${originalText}\\\\n\\\\n→ 已略過`);\\n      } catch { /* ignore */ }\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"已略過\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    if (choice === \\\"yes\\\") {\\n      try {\\n        await ctx.editMessageText(`${originalText}\\\\n\\\\n→ 開始萃取 skill…`);\\n      } catch { /* ignore */ }\\n      await ctx.answerCallbackQuery({ text: \\\"開始萃取…\\\" });\\n      const chatId = ctx.chat?.id;\\n      if (chatId === undefined) return;\\n      let session: ChatSession;\\n      try {\\n        session = await sessions.get(chatId, ctx.from?.id);\\n      } catch (err) {\\n        await ctx.reply(`Failed to start agent: ${(err as Error).message}`);\\n        return;\\n      }\\n      const skillDir = detectSkillDir();\\n      const prompt =\\n        `[系統] 使用者確認要把「${skillName}」寫成 skill。\\\\n` +\\n        `請依照 memory-to-skill 和 writing-skills 的規範，在 ${skillDir}/ms-${skillName}/ 建立 SKILL.md。\\\\n\\\\n` +\\n        `規則：\\\\n` +\\n        `- 先讀 ${skillDir}/writing-skills/SKILL.md 確認格式規範\\\\n` +\\n        `- 檢查 ${skillDir}/ 是否已有同名或高度重疊的 skill，有就 append/rewrite\\\\n` +\\n        `- YAML frontmatter 的 description 用「Use when…」開頭\\\\n` +\\n        `- 內容來自本次對話中的經驗/模式\\\\n` +\\n        `- 完成後 remember() 記錄新 skill 已建立`;\\n      await runPrompt(ctx, session, prompt, { kind: \\\"meta\\\" });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    await ctx.answerCallbackQuery();\\n    return;\\n  }\\n\\n  await ctx.answerCallbackQuery();\\n});\\n\\nbot.command(\\\"start\\\", (ctx) =>\\n  ctx.reply(\\n    \\\"Hi, I'm bridged to Kiro. 0) + 1;\\n      groupTurnCounters.set(key, turns);\\n      if (turns > GROUP_MAX_BOT_TURNS) {\\n        groupTurnCounters.set(key, 0);\\n        await ctx.reply(\\\"⚠️ 已達群組 bot 連續回覆上限，暫停回應。\\\");\\n        return;\\n      }\\n    } else {\\n      // 人類發話時重置計數器\\n      const key = `group_turns_${chatId}`;\\n      groupTurnCounters.set(key, 0);\\n      getRelayLoopGuard()?.reset();\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // AB-7b: a real user message always preempts a pending goal\\n  // continuation.
